name: set query
func:
const dateList = JSON.stringify(msg.payload)
const msData = global.get("MINORSTOP_DEFAULT");
const id = msData.id
const effectId = msData.effectid
const msTreshold = global.get("DOWNTIME_DEFAULT.treshold");

var a = `
import "date"
import "contrib/tomhollingworth/events"
import "array"
import "math"

msTreshold = ${msTreshold}
effectId = "${id}"
reasonId = "${effectId}"

dateList= ${dateList}


oeeSummary = (queryStart,queryEnd,resolution,shift,duration,elapsed,entityId) => {
  startQuery = time(v:queryStart)
  endQuery = time(v:queryEnd)

  
  event =
  from(bucket: "[OEE] Event")
    |> range(start:  startQuery , stop : now())
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "oee")
    |> filter(fn: (r) => if entityId == "-" then true else  r["entityId"] == entityId)
    |> pivot(rowKey:["_time"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
    |> events.duration(
            unit: 1s,
            columnName: "duration",
            timeColumn: "_time",
            stopColumn: "_stop",
            stop: now()
        )
    |> map(fn:  (r) => ({ r with 
      effectId: if r.duration < msTreshold and r.state == "start" then  effectId else  r.effectId  , 
      reasonId: if r.duration < msTreshold and r.state == "start" then  reasonId else r.reasonId
  }))


	eventList = 
  event
    |> set(key: "resolution", value: resolution)
    |> set(key: "type", value: "event")
    |> drop(columns: ["_start", "_stop"])
    |> group(columns: ["entityId","type"])
  eventSummary = 
  eventList
    |> group(columns: ["entityId","reasonId","_measurement"])
    |> reduce(fn: (r, accumulator) => ({ duration: r.duration + accumulator.duration , count: 1 + accumulator.count}), identity: {duration: 0 , count:0})
    |> drop(columns: ["_start", "_stop"])
    |> set(key: "resolution", value: resolution)
    |> set(key: "type", value: "summaryEvent")
    |> group(columns: ["entityId","type"])


  AllData =
  from(bucket: "[OEE] Hourly")
    |> range(start:  startQuery , stop : endQuery)
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "oee")
    |> filter(fn: (r) => if entityId == "-" then true else  r["entityId"] == entityId)


  Data =
  AllData
    |> group(columns: ["entityId","_time","_field"])
    |> sum()
    |> group(columns: ["entityId"])
    |> sort(columns: ["_time"], desc: false)  


  hourlyData =
  Data
    |> pivot(rowKey:["_time"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
    |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with resolution: resolution , type : "hourlyData" , _Total: (if exists r._Good then r._Good else 0.0) + (if exists r._Reject then r._Reject else 0.0)}))
    |> group(columns: ["entityId","type"])
    |> drop(columns: ["_start", "_stop"])
    |> sort(columns: ["_time"], desc: false) 


  dailyDefectData = 
  from(bucket: "[OEE] Realtime")
    |> range(start: startQuery, stop: endQuery)
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "defectrework")
    |> filter(fn: (r) => if entityId == "-" then true else  r["entityId"] == entityId)


  defectHourly = 
    dailyDefectData
    |> group(columns: ["entityId","_field","reasonId","defect_reason"], mode:"by")
    |> aggregateWindow(every: 1h, fn: sum)
    |> fill(value: 0.0)
    |> reduce(fn: (r, accumulator) => ({ 
        _Rework: (if r._field == "_Rework" then r._value else 0.0 )+ accumulator._Rework,
        _Defect: (if r._field == "_Reject" then r._value else 0.0 )+ accumulator._Defect,
      }), 
    |> drop(columns: ["_start", "_stop","_measurement"])
    |> rename(columns: {_Reject: "_Defect"})
    |> set(key: "resolution", value: resolution)
    |> set(key: "type", value: "defecthourly")
    |> group(columns: ["entityId","type"])


  defectSummary = 
    dailyDefectData
    |> group(columns: ["entityId","defect_reason","_field"], mode:"by")
    |> sum()
    |> drop(columns: ["_start", "_stop"])
    |> set(key: "resolution", value: resolution)
    |> set(key: "type", value: "summaryDefect")
    |> group(columns: ["entityId","type"])

  result2 = union(tables: [defectSummary,defectHourly,hourlyData,eventList,eventSummary])
    |> group(columns: ["entityId", "type"], mode:"by")

  eventTotal = 
    from(bucket: "[OEE] Event")
      |> range(start:  startQuery , stop : now())
      |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "oee")
      |> filter(fn: (r) => if entityId == "-" then true else  r["entityId"] == entityId)
      |> pivot(rowKey:["_time"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
      |> events.duration(
              unit: 1s,
              columnName: "duration",
              timeColumn: "_time",
              stopColumn: "_stop",
              stop: now()
          )
      |> map(fn:  (r) => ({ r with 
        effectId: if r.duration < msTreshold and r.state == "start" then  effectId else  r.effectId  , 
        reasonId: if r.duration < msTreshold and r.state == "start" then  reasonId else r.reasonId
        }))
      |> group(columns: ["entityId"])
      |> reduce(fn: (r, accumulator) => ({ 
            RUNNING :( if r.effectId == "RUNNING" then float(v: r.duration) else 0.0 )+ accumulator.RUNNING,
            PLANNED :( if r.effectId == "2" then float(v: r.duration) else 0.0 )+ accumulator.PLANNED,
            IDLE :( if r.effectId == "17" then float(v: r.duration) else 0.0 )+ accumulator.IDLE,
            UNPLANNED :( if r.effectId == "3" then float(v: r.duration) else 0.0 )+ accumulator.UNPLANNED,
            PERFORMANCE :( if r.effectId == "1" then float(v: r.duration) else 0.0 )+ accumulator.PERFORMANCE,
            MINORSTOPPAGE :( if r.effectId == "19" then float(v: r.duration) else 0.0 )+ accumulator.MINORSTOPPAGE,
            QUALITY :( if r.effectId == "4" then float(v: r.duration) else 0.0 )+ accumulator.QUALITY,
        }), 
            identity: {
            PERFORMANCE : 0.0,
            PLANNED : 0.0,
            UNPLANNED : 0.0,
            QUALITY : 0.0,
            IDLE : 0.0,
            RUNNING : 0.0,
            MINORSTOPPAGE : 0.0
        })

  defectTotal = 
  from(bucket: "[OEE] Realtime")
    |> range(start: startQuery, stop: endQuery)
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "defectrework")
    |> filter(fn: (r) => if entityId == "-" then true else  r["entityId"] == entityId)
    |> group(columns: ["entityId"], mode:"by")
    |> reduce(fn: (r, accumulator) => ({ 
        _Rework: (if r._field == "_Rework" then r._value else 0.0 )+ accumulator._Rework,
        _Defect: (if r._field == "_Reject" then r._value else 0.0 )+ accumulator._Defect,
      }), 
      identity: {_Rework: 0.0 , _Defect:0.0})

  productionTotal = 
  from(bucket: "[OEE] Hourly")
      |> range(start:  startQuery , stop : endQuery)
      |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "oee")
      |> filter(fn: (r) => if entityId == "-" then true else  r["entityId"] == entityId)
      |> group(columns: ["entityId","_time","_field"])
      |> sum()
      |> group(columns: ["entityId"])
      |> sort(columns: ["_time"], desc: false)    
      |> drop(columns: ["_start", "_stop"])
      |> reduce(fn: (r, accumulator) => ({ 
            _Good : if r._field == "_Good" then accumulator._Good + r._value else accumulator._Good,
            _Reject : if r._field == "_Reject" then accumulator._Reject + r._value else accumulator._Reject,
            _Total : if r._field == "_Good" or  r._field == "_Reject" then accumulator._Total + r._value else  accumulator._Total,
            _TotalLost : if r._field == "_TotalLost" then accumulator._TotalLost + r._value else accumulator._TotalLost
        }), 
            identity: {
            _TotalLost : 0.0,
            _Reject : 0.0,
            _Good : 0.0,
            _Total : 0.0
        })

  result = 
  union(tables: [eventTotal,productionTotal,defectTotal])
    |> reduce(fn: (r, accumulator) => ({ 
          availableTime: float(v:duration),
          PERFORMANCE : if exists r.PERFORMANCE then r.PERFORMANCE else accumulator.PERFORMANCE ,
          PLANNED : if exists r.PLANNED then r.PLANNED else accumulator.PLANNED ,
          UNPLANNED : if exists r.UNPLANNED then r.UNPLANNED else accumulator.UNPLANNED ,
          QUALITY : if exists r.QUALITY then r.QUALITY else accumulator.QUALITY ,
          IDLE : if exists r.IDLE  then r.IDLE else accumulator.IDLE ,
          RUNNING : if exists r.RUNNING  then r.RUNNING else accumulator.RUNNING ,
          MINORSTOPPAGE : if exists r.MINORSTOPPAGE  then r.MINORSTOPPAGE else accumulator.MINORSTOPPAGE ,
          _Good : if exists r._Good  then  r._Good else accumulator._Good,
          _Reject : if exists r._Reject  then  r._Reject else accumulator._Reject,
          _Total : if exists r._Total then r._Total else accumulator._Total,
          _Defect : if exists r._Defect then  r._Defect else accumulator._Defect,
          _Rework :if exists r._Rework then  r._Rework else accumulator._Rework,
          _TargetProduction :if exists r._TotalLost then  r._TotalLost else accumulator._TargetProduction
      }), 
          identity: {
          PERFORMANCE : 0.0,
          PLANNED : 0.0,
          UNPLANNED : 0.0,
          QUALITY : 0.0,
          IDLE : 0.0,
          RUNNING : 0.0,
          MINORSTOPPAGE : 0.0,
          _Reject : 0.0,
          _Good : 0.0,
          _Total : 0.0,
          _Defect : 0.0,
          _Rework : 0.0 , 
          _TargetProduction : 0.0,
          availableTime: 0.0
      })
    |> map(
      fn: (r) => ({r with
          target_actual_production: r._TargetProduction,
          duration: duration,
          elapsed:elapsed,
          availibilityLoss : r.UNPLANNED,
          right_first_time : math.round(x:  r._Total  /  (r._Total + r._Defect + r._Rework) * 100.0),
          quality_rate : math.round(x: r._Total  / (r._Total+ r._Defect ) * 100.0),
          avg_cycle_time : math.round(x:  (r._Total + r._Defect + r._Rework) / duration * 60.0),
          plannedProductiveTime : r.availableTime - r.PLANNED - r.IDLE,
          _Total: (r._Total + r._Defect + r._Rework -r._Reject)
          }),
      )
    |> map(
      fn: (r) => ({r with
          operatingTime : r.plannedProductiveTime - r.availibilityLoss,
          performance_loss : r.PERFORMANCE + r.MINORSTOPPAGE
          }),
      )
    |> map(
      fn: (r) => ({r with
          netOperatingTime : r._Total / (r.target_actual_production/r.elapsed  ),
          quality_loss : r.QUALITY + r._Defect +r._Rework
          }),
      )
    |> map(
      fn: (r) => ({r with
          fullyProductiveTime : r.netOperatingTime 
          }),
      )
    |> map(
      fn: (r) => ({r with
          availability : math.round(x: r.operatingTime / r.plannedProductiveTime * 100.0),
          performance : math.round(x: r.netOperatingTime / r.operatingTime * 100.0),
          quality : math.round(x: r.fullyProductiveTime / r.netOperatingTime * 100.0),
          }),
      )
    |> map(
      fn: (r) => ({r with
          oee : math.round(x: r.fullyProductiveTime / r.plannedProductiveTime * 100.0)
          }),
      )
    |> set(key: "resolution", value: resolution)
    |> set(key: "type", value: "summaryOEE")
    |> set(key: "start", value: string(v: startQuery))
    |> set(key: "end", value: string(v: endQuery))
    |> set(key: "shift", value: string(v: shift))  
    |> group(columns: ["entityId","type"])
 
  result3 = union(tables: [
      result,
      result2
      ]
) 
	return result3
}






oeeSummaryTotal = array.map(arr: dateList, fn: (x) => oeeSummary(
        queryStart: x.queryStart,
        queryEnd : x.queryEnd,
        resolution : x.resolution,
        shift : x.shift,
        duration: float(v:x.duration),
        elapsed: float(v: x.elapsed),
        entityId: x.entityId,
))

union(tables: oeeSummaryTotal)`

msg.query = a
msg.dtTreshold = msTreshold


return msg;

name: function 33
func: return msg;

name: set query
func:
const dateList = JSON.stringify(msg.payload)
const msData = global.get("MINORSTOP_DEFAULT");
const id = msData.id
const effectId = msData.effectid
const msTreshold = global.get("DOWNTIME_DEFAULT.treshold");
const defaultDt = global.get("DOWNTIME_DEFAULT.id")

var a = `
import "date"
import "contrib/tomhollingworth/events"
import "array"
import "math"

msTreshold = ${msTreshold}
effectId = "${effectId}"
reasonId = "${id}"
defaultDt = "${defaultDt}"

dateList= ${dateList}


oeeSummary = (skuId,queryStart,queryEnd,resolution,shift,duration,elapsed,entityId) => {
  startQuery = time(v:queryStart)
  endQuery = time(v:queryEnd)
  eventDurationTimeHelper = if now() > endQuery then endQuery else now()

  
  event =
  from(bucket: "[OEE] Event")
    |> range(start:  startQuery , stop :  eventDurationTimeHelper)
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "oee")
    |> filter(fn: (r) => if entityId == "-" then true else  r["entityId"] == entityId)
    |> filter(fn: (r) => if skuId == "-" then true else  r["skuId"] == skuId)
    |> pivot(rowKey:["_time"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
    |> events.duration(
            unit: 1s,
            columnName: "duration",
            timeColumn: "_time",
            stopColumn: "_stop",
            stop: eventDurationTimeHelper
        )
    |> map(fn:  (r) => ({ r with 
      effectId: if r.duration <= msTreshold and r.reasonId == defaultDt then  effectId else  r.effectId  , 
      reasonId: if r.duration <= msTreshold and r.reasonId == defaultDt then  reasonId else r.reasonId
  }))


	eventList = 
  event
    |> set(key: "resolution", value: resolution)
    |> set(key: "type", value: "event")
    |> drop(columns: ["_start", "_stop"])
    |> group(columns: ["entityId","type"])
    
  eventSummary = 
  eventList
    |> group(columns: ["entityId","reasonId","_measurement"])
    |> reduce(fn: (r, accumulator) => ({ duration: r.duration + accumulator.duration , count: 1 + accumulator.count}), identity: {duration: 0 , count:0})
    |> drop(columns: ["_start", "_stop"])
    |> set(key: "resolution", value: resolution)
    |> set(key: "type", value: "summaryEvent")
    |> group(columns: ["entityId","type"])


  AllData =
  from(bucket: "[OEE] Hourly")
    |> range(start:  if skuId == "-" then startQuery else date.truncate(t: startQuery, unit: 1h) , stop : endQuery)
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "oee")
    |> filter(fn: (r) => if entityId == "-" then true else  r["entityId"] == entityId)
    |> filter(fn: (r) => if skuId == "-" then true else  r["skuId"] == skuId)

  Data =
  AllData
    |> group(columns: ["entityId","_time","_field"])
    |> sum()
    |> group(columns: ["entityId"])
    |> sort(columns: ["_time"], desc: false)  


  hourlyData =
  Data
    |> pivot(rowKey:["_time"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
    |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with resolution: resolution , type : "hourlyData" , _Total: (if exists r._Good then r._Good else 0.0) + (if exists r._Reject then r._Reject else 0.0)}))
    |> group(columns: ["entityId","type"])
    |> drop(columns: ["_start", "_stop"])
    |> sort(columns: ["_time"], desc: false) 


  dailyDefectData = 
  from(bucket: "[OEE] Realtime")
    |> range(start: startQuery, stop: endQuery)
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "defectrework")
    |> filter(fn: (r) => if entityId == "-" then true else  r["entityId"] == entityId)
    |> filter(fn: (r) => if skuId == "-" then true else  r["skuId"] == skuId)

  defectSummary = 
    dailyDefectData
    |> group(columns: ["entityId","defect_reason","_field"], mode:"by")
    |> sum()
    |> drop(columns: ["_start", "_stop"])
    |> set(key: "resolution", value: resolution)
    |> set(key: "type", value: "summaryDefect")
    |> group(columns: ["entityId","type"])

  result2 = union(tables: [defectSummary,hourlyData,eventList,eventSummary])
    |> group(columns: ["entityId", "type"], mode:"by")

  eventTotal = 
    event
      |> group(columns: ["entityId"])
      |> reduce(fn: (r, accumulator) => ({ 
            RUNNING :( if r.effectId == "RUNNING" then float(v: r.duration) else 0.0 )+ accumulator.RUNNING,
            PLANNED :( if r.effectId == "2" then float(v: r.duration) else 0.0 )+ accumulator.PLANNED,
            IDLE :( if r.effectId == "5" then float(v: r.duration) else 0.0 )+ accumulator.IDLE,
            UNPLANNED :( if r.effectId == "3" then float(v: r.duration) else 0.0 )+ accumulator.UNPLANNED,
            PERFORMANCE :( if r.effectId == "1" then float(v: r.duration) else 0.0 )+ accumulator.PERFORMANCE,
            MINORSTOPPAGE :( if r.effectId == "7" then float(v: r.duration) else 0.0 )+ accumulator.MINORSTOPPAGE,
            QUALITY :( if r.effectId == "4" then float(v: r.duration) else 0.0 )+ accumulator.QUALITY,
        }), 
            identity: {
            PERFORMANCE : 0.0,
            PLANNED : 0.0,
            UNPLANNED : 0.0,
            QUALITY : 0.0,
            IDLE : 0.0,
            RUNNING : 0.0,
            MINORSTOPPAGE : 0.0
        })

  defectTotal = 
  from(bucket: "[OEE] Realtime")
    |> range(start: startQuery, stop: endQuery)
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "defectrework")
    |> filter(fn: (r) => if entityId == "-" then true else  r["entityId"] == entityId)
    |> filter(fn: (r) => if skuId == "-" then true else  r["skuId"] == skuId)
    |> group(columns: ["entityId","_field"], mode:"by")
    |> sum(column: "_value")
    |> group(columns: ["entityId"], mode:"by")
    |> reduce(fn: (r, accumulator) => ({ 
        _Rework: (if r._field == "_Rework" then r._value else 0.0 )+ accumulator._Rework,
        _Defect: (if r._field == "_Reject" then r._value else 0.0 )+ accumulator._Defect,
      }), 
      identity: {_Rework: 0.0 , _Defect:0.0})

  productionTotal = 
  AllData
      |> group(columns: ["entityId","_time","_field"])
      |> sum()
      |> group(columns: ["entityId"])
      |> sort(columns: ["_time"], desc: false)    
      |> drop(columns: ["_start", "_stop"])
      |> reduce(fn: (r, accumulator) => ({ 
            _Good : if r._field == "_Good" then accumulator._Good + r._value else accumulator._Good,
            _Reject : if r._field == "_Reject" then accumulator._Reject + r._value else accumulator._Reject,
            _Total : if r._field == "_Good" or  r._field == "_Reject" then accumulator._Total + r._value else  accumulator._Total,
            _TotalLost : if r._field == "_TotalLost" then accumulator._TotalLost + r._value else accumulator._TotalLost
        }), 
            identity: {
            _TotalLost : 0.0,
            _Reject : 0.0,
            _Good : 0.0,
            _Total : 0.0
        })

  result = 
  union(tables: [eventTotal,productionTotal,defectTotal])
    |> reduce(fn: (r, accumulator) => ({ 
          availableTime: float(v:duration),
          PERFORMANCE : if exists r.PERFORMANCE then r.PERFORMANCE else accumulator.PERFORMANCE ,
          PLANNED : if exists r.PLANNED then r.PLANNED else accumulator.PLANNED ,
          UNPLANNED : if exists r.UNPLANNED then r.UNPLANNED else accumulator.UNPLANNED ,
          QUALITY : if exists r.QUALITY then r.QUALITY else accumulator.QUALITY ,
          IDLE : if exists r.IDLE  then r.IDLE else accumulator.IDLE ,
          RUNNING : if exists r.RUNNING  then r.RUNNING else accumulator.RUNNING ,
          MINORSTOPPAGE : if exists r.MINORSTOPPAGE  then r.MINORSTOPPAGE else accumulator.MINORSTOPPAGE ,
          _Good : if exists r._Good  then  r._Good else accumulator._Good,
          _Reject : if exists r._Reject  then  r._Reject else accumulator._Reject,
          _Total : if exists r._Total then r._Total else accumulator._Total,
          _Defect : if exists r._Defect then  r._Defect else accumulator._Defect,
          _Rework :if exists r._Rework then  r._Rework else accumulator._Rework,
          _TargetProduction :if exists r._TotalLost then  math.round(x:r._TotalLost) else math.round(x:accumulator._TargetProduction)
      }), 
          identity: {
          PERFORMANCE : 0.0,
          PLANNED : 0.0,
          UNPLANNED : 0.0,
          QUALITY : 0.0,
          IDLE : 0.0,
          RUNNING : 0.0,
          MINORSTOPPAGE : 0.0,
          _Reject : 0.0,
          _Good : 0.0,
          _Total : 0.0,
          _Defect : 0.0,
          _Rework : 0.0 , 
          _TargetProduction : 0.0,
          availableTime: 0.0
      })
    |> map(
      fn: (r) => ({r with
          _Total: (r._Total + r._Defect + r._Rework -r._Reject),
          elapsed:if elapsed > duration then duration else elapsed,
          availibilityLoss : r.UNPLANNED,
          target_cycle_time : math.round(x:  (r._TargetProduction) / elapsed * 60.0),
          plannedProductiveTime : r.availableTime - r.PLANNED - r.IDLE,
          })
      )
    |> map(
      fn: (r) => ({r with
          avg_cycle_time : math.round(x:  (r._Total + r._Defect + r._Rework) / elapsed * 60.0),
          operatingTime : r.plannedProductiveTime - r.availibilityLoss,
          right_first_time : if r._Total - r._Defect - r._Rework == 0.0 then 0.0 else math.round(x:  (r._Total - r._Defect - r._Rework)  /  r._Total  * 100.0),
          quality_rate : if r._Total- r._Defect == 0.0 then 0.0 else math.round(x: (r._Total- r._Defect )  / r._Total * 100.0),
          per_loss_time : r.elapsed - r.PLANNED - r.UNPLANNED - r.PERFORMANCE - r.MINORSTOPPAGE - (if r._Total == 0.0 or r._TargetProduction == 0.0 then 0.0 else math.round(x:( r._Total / r._TargetProduction * elapsed)))
        }),
    )
    |> map(
      fn: (r) => ({r with
        up_speed : if r.per_loss_time < 0.0 then math.abs(x: r.per_loss_time) else 0.0 ,
        per_loss_time : if r.per_loss_time < 0.0 then 0.0 else r.per_loss_time
        }),
    )
    |> map(
      fn: (r) => ({r with
          performance_loss : r.per_loss_time + r.up_speed + r.PERFORMANCE + r.MINORSTOPPAGE,
          quality_loss : if r.QUALITY + r._Defect +r._Rework == 0.0 then 0.0 else (r.QUALITY + r._Defect +r._Rework) / r.target_cycle_time
          }),
      )
    |> map(
      fn: (r) => ({r with
          netOperatingTime : r.operatingTime - r.performance_loss,
          fullyProductiveTime : r.operatingTime - r.performance_loss
          }),
      )
    |> map(
      fn: (r) => ({r with
          availability : if exists r.operatingTime then  math.round(x: r.operatingTime / r.plannedProductiveTime * 100.0) else 0.0,
          performance : if exists r.netOperatingTime then  math.round(x: r.netOperatingTime / r.operatingTime * 100.0) else 0.0,
          quality : if exists r.fullyProductiveTime then  math.round(x: r.fullyProductiveTime / r.netOperatingTime * 100.0) else 0.0,
          oee : if exists r.fullyProductiveTime then  math.round(x: r.fullyProductiveTime / r.plannedProductiveTime * 100.0) else 0.0,
          }),
      )
    |> set(key: "resolution", value: resolution)
    |> set(key: "type", value: "summaryOEE")
    |> set(key: "start", value: string(v: startQuery))
    |> set(key: "end", value: string(v: endQuery))
    |> set(key: "shift", value: string(v: shift))  
    |> group(columns: ["entityId","type"])
 
  result3 = union(tables: [
      result,
      result2
      ]
) 
	return result3
}
oeeSummaryTotal = array.map(arr: dateList, fn: (x) => oeeSummary(
  queryStart: x.queryStart,
  queryEnd : x.queryEnd,
  resolution : x.resolution,
  shift : x.shift,
  duration: float(v:x.duration),
  elapsed: float(v: x.elapsed),
  entityId: x.entityId,
  skuId: x.skuId
))

union(tables: oeeSummaryTotal)`

msg.query = a
msg.dtTreshold = msTreshold


return msg;

name: set query
func:
const dateList = JSON.stringify(msg.payload)
const msData = global.get("MINORSTOP_DEFAULT");
const id = msData.id
const effectId = msData.effectid
const msTreshold = global.get("DOWNTIME_DEFAULT.treshold");

var a = `
import "date"
import "contrib/tomhollingworth/events"
import "array"
import "math"

msTreshold = ${msTreshold}
effectId = "${id}"
reasonId = "${effectId}"

dateList= ${dateList}


oeeSummary = (queryStart,queryEnd,resolution,shift,duration,elapsed,entityId) => {
  startQuery = time(v:queryStart)
  endQuery = time(v:queryEnd)

  
  event =
  from(bucket: "[OEE] Event")
    |> range(start:  startQuery , stop : now())
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "oee")
    |> filter(fn: (r) => if entityId == "-" then true else  r["entityId"] == entityId)
    |> pivot(rowKey:["_time"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
    |> events.duration(
            unit: 1s,
            columnName: "duration",
            timeColumn: "_time",
            stopColumn: "_stop",
            stop: now()
        )
    |> map(fn:  (r) => ({ r with 
      effectId: if r.duration < msTreshold and r.state == "start" then  effectId else  r.effectId  , 
      reasonId: if r.duration < msTreshold and r.state == "start" then  reasonId else r.reasonId
  }))


	eventList = 
  event
    |> set(key: "resolution", value: resolution)
    |> set(key: "type", value: "event")
    |> drop(columns: ["_start", "_stop"])
    |> group(columns: ["entityId","type"])
    
  eventSummary = 
  eventList
    |> group(columns: ["entityId","reasonId","_measurement"])
    |> reduce(fn: (r, accumulator) => ({ duration: r.duration + accumulator.duration , count: 1 + accumulator.count}), identity: {duration: 0 , count:0})
    |> drop(columns: ["_start", "_stop"])
    |> set(key: "resolution", value: resolution)
    |> set(key: "type", value: "summaryEvent")
    |> group(columns: ["entityId","type"])


  AllData =
  from(bucket: "[OEE] Hourly")
    |> range(start:  startQuery , stop : endQuery)
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "oee")
    |> filter(fn: (r) => if entityId == "-" then true else  r["entityId"] == entityId)


  Data =
  AllData
    |> group(columns: ["entityId","_time","_field"])
    |> sum()
    |> group(columns: ["entityId"])
    |> sort(columns: ["_time"], desc: false)  


  hourlyData =
  Data
    |> pivot(rowKey:["_time"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
    |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with resolution: resolution , type : "hourlyData" , _Total: (if exists r._Good then r._Good else 0.0) + (if exists r._Reject then r._Reject else 0.0)}))
    |> group(columns: ["entityId","type"])
    |> drop(columns: ["_start", "_stop"])
    |> sort(columns: ["_time"], desc: false) 


  dailyDefectData = 
  from(bucket: "[OEE] Realtime")
    |> range(start: startQuery, stop: endQuery)
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "defectrework")
    |> filter(fn: (r) => if entityId == "-" then true else  r["entityId"] == entityId)


  defectSummary = 
    dailyDefectData
    |> group(columns: ["entityId","defect_reason","_field"], mode:"by")
    |> sum()
    |> drop(columns: ["_start", "_stop"])
    |> set(key: "resolution", value: resolution)
    |> set(key: "type", value: "summaryDefect")
    |> group(columns: ["entityId","type"])

  result2 = union(tables: [defectSummary,hourlyData,eventList,eventSummary])
    |> group(columns: ["entityId", "type"], mode:"by")

  eventTotal = 
    from(bucket: "[OEE] Event")
      |> range(start:  startQuery , stop : now())
      |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "oee")
      |> filter(fn: (r) => if entityId == "-" then true else  r["entityId"] == entityId)
      |> pivot(rowKey:["_time"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
      |> events.duration(
              unit: 1s,
              columnName: "duration",
              timeColumn: "_time",
              stopColumn: "_stop",
              stop: now()
          )
      |> map(fn:  (r) => ({ r with 
        effectId: if r.duration < msTreshold and r.state == "start" then  effectId else  r.effectId  , 
        reasonId: if r.duration < msTreshold and r.state == "start" then  reasonId else r.reasonId
        }))
      |> group(columns: ["entityId"])
      |> reduce(fn: (r, accumulator) => ({ 
            RUNNING :( if r.effectId == "RUNNING" then float(v: r.duration) else 0.0 )+ accumulator.RUNNING,
            PLANNED :( if r.effectId == "2" then float(v: r.duration) else 0.0 )+ accumulator.PLANNED,
            IDLE :( if r.effectId == "5" then float(v: r.duration) else 0.0 )+ accumulator.IDLE,
            UNPLANNED :( if r.effectId == "3" then float(v: r.duration) else 0.0 )+ accumulator.UNPLANNED,
            PERFORMANCE :( if r.effectId == "1" then float(v: r.duration) else 0.0 )+ accumulator.PERFORMANCE,
            MINORSTOPPAGE :( if r.effectId == "7" then float(v: r.duration) else 0.0 )+ accumulator.MINORSTOPPAGE,
            QUALITY :( if r.effectId == "4" then float(v: r.duration) else 0.0 )+ accumulator.QUALITY,
        }), 
            identity: {
            PERFORMANCE : 0.0,
            PLANNED : 0.0,
            UNPLANNED : 0.0,
            QUALITY : 0.0,
            IDLE : 0.0,
            RUNNING : 0.0,
            MINORSTOPPAGE : 0.0
        })

  defectTotal = 
  from(bucket: "[OEE] Realtime")
    |> range(start: startQuery, stop: endQuery)
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "defectrework")
    |> filter(fn: (r) => if entityId == "-" then true else  r["entityId"] == entityId)
    |> group(columns: ["entityId","_field"], mode:"by")
    |> sum(column: "_value")
    |> group(columns: ["entityId"], mode:"by")
    |> reduce(fn: (r, accumulator) => ({ 
        _Rework: (if r._field == "_Rework" then r._value else 0.0 )+ accumulator._Rework,
        _Defect: (if r._field == "_Reject" then r._value else 0.0 )+ accumulator._Defect,
      }), 
      identity: {_Rework: 0.0 , _Defect:0.0})

  productionTotal = 
  from(bucket: "[OEE] Hourly")
      |> range(start:  startQuery , stop : endQuery)
      |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "oee")
      |> filter(fn: (r) => if entityId == "-" then true else  r["entityId"] == entityId)
      |> group(columns: ["entityId","_time","_field"])
      |> sum()
      |> group(columns: ["entityId"])
      |> sort(columns: ["_time"], desc: false)    
      |> drop(columns: ["_start", "_stop"])
      |> reduce(fn: (r, accumulator) => ({ 
            _Good : if r._field == "_Good" then accumulator._Good + r._value else accumulator._Good,
            _Reject : if r._field == "_Reject" then accumulator._Reject + r._value else accumulator._Reject,
            _Total : if r._field == "_Good" or  r._field == "_Reject" then accumulator._Total + r._value else  accumulator._Total,
            _TotalLost : if r._field == "_TotalLost" then accumulator._TotalLost + r._value else accumulator._TotalLost
        }), 
            identity: {
            _TotalLost : 0.0,
            _Reject : 0.0,
            _Good : 0.0,
            _Total : 0.0
        })

  result = 
  union(tables: [eventTotal,productionTotal,defectTotal])
    |> reduce(fn: (r, accumulator) => ({ 
          availableTime: float(v:duration),
          PERFORMANCE : if exists r.PERFORMANCE then r.PERFORMANCE else accumulator.PERFORMANCE ,
          PLANNED : if exists r.PLANNED then r.PLANNED else accumulator.PLANNED ,
          UNPLANNED : if exists r.UNPLANNED then r.UNPLANNED else accumulator.UNPLANNED ,
          QUALITY : if exists r.QUALITY then r.QUALITY else accumulator.QUALITY ,
          IDLE : if exists r.IDLE  then r.IDLE else accumulator.IDLE ,
          RUNNING : if exists r.RUNNING  then r.RUNNING else accumulator.RUNNING ,
          MINORSTOPPAGE : if exists r.MINORSTOPPAGE  then r.MINORSTOPPAGE else accumulator.MINORSTOPPAGE ,
          _Good : if exists r._Good  then  r._Good else accumulator._Good,
          _Reject : if exists r._Reject  then  r._Reject else accumulator._Reject,
          _Total : if exists r._Total then r._Total else accumulator._Total,
          _Defect : if exists r._Defect then  r._Defect else accumulator._Defect,
          _Rework :if exists r._Rework then  r._Rework else accumulator._Rework,
          _TargetProduction :if exists r._TotalLost then  r._TotalLost else accumulator._TargetProduction
      }), 
          identity: {
          PERFORMANCE : 0.0,
          PLANNED : 0.0,
          UNPLANNED : 0.0,
          QUALITY : 0.0,
          IDLE : 0.0,
          RUNNING : 0.0,
          MINORSTOPPAGE : 0.0,
          _Reject : 0.0,
          _Good : 0.0,
          _Total : 0.0,
          _Defect : 0.0,
          _Rework : 0.0 , 
          _TargetProduction : 0.0,
          availableTime: 0.0
      })
    |> map(
      fn: (r) => ({r with
          target_actual_production: r._TargetProduction,
          duration: r.duration,
          elapsed:elapsed,
          availibilityLoss : r.UNPLANNED,
          right_first_time : math.round(x:  r._Total  /  (r._Total + r._Defect + r._Rework) * 100.0),
          quality_rate : math.round(x: r._Total  / (r._Total+ r._Defect ) * 100.0),
          target_cycle_time : math.round(x:  (r._TargetProduction) / elapsed * 60.0),
          avg_cycle_time : math.round(x:  (r._Total + r._Defect + r._Rework) / elapsed * 60.0),
          plannedProductiveTime : r.availableTime - r.PLANNED - r.IDLE,
          _Total: (r._Total + r._Defect + r._Rework -r._Reject),
          per_loss_time : r._Total / (r._TargetProduction / elapsed  )
          })
      )
    |> map(
      fn: (r) => ({r with
          operatingTime : r.plannedProductiveTime - r.availibilityLoss,
          performance_loss : math.abs(x: r.PERFORMANCE + r.MINORSTOPPAGE + r.plannedProductiveTime - r.availibilityLoss - r.per_loss_time)
          }),
      )
    |> map(
      fn: (r) => ({r with
          netOperatingTime : r.operatingTime - r.performance_loss,
          quality_loss : r.QUALITY + r._Defect +r._Rework
          }),
      )
    |> map(
      fn: (r) => ({r with
          fullyProductiveTime : r.netOperatingTime 
          }),
      )
    |> map(
      fn: (r) => ({r with
          availability : math.round(x: r.operatingTime / r.plannedProductiveTime * 100.0),
          performance : math.round(x: r.netOperatingTime / r.operatingTime * 100.0),
          quality : math.round(x: r.fullyProductiveTime / r.netOperatingTime * 100.0),
          }),
      )
    |> map(
      fn: (r) => ({r with
          oee : math.round(x: r.fullyProductiveTime / r.plannedProductiveTime * 100.0)
          }),
      )
    |> set(key: "resolution", value: resolution)
    |> set(key: "type", value: "summaryOEE")
    |> set(key: "start", value: string(v: startQuery))
    |> set(key: "end", value: string(v: endQuery))
    |> set(key: "shift", value: string(v: shift))  
    |> group(columns: ["entityId","type"])
 
  result3 = union(tables: [
      result,
      result2
      ]
) 
	return result3
}






oeeSummaryTotal = array.map(arr: dateList, fn: (x) => oeeSummary(
        queryStart: x.queryStart,
        queryEnd : x.queryEnd,
        resolution : x.resolution,
        shift : x.shift,
        duration: float(v:x.duration),
        elapsed: float(v: x.elapsed),
        entityId: x.entityId,
))

union(tables: oeeSummaryTotal)`

msg.query = a
msg.dtTreshold = msTreshold


return msg;

      fn: (r) => ({r with
          oee : math.round(x: r.fullyProductiveTime / r.plannedProductiveTime * 100.0)
          }),
      )
    |> set(key: "resolution", value: resolution)
    |> set(key: "type", value: "summaryOEE")
    |> set(key: "start", value: string(v: startQuery))
    |> set(key: "end", value: string(v: endQuery))
    |> set(key: "shift", value: string(v: shift))  
    |> group(columns: ["entityId","type"])
 
  result3 = union(tables: [
      result,
      result2
      ]
) 
	return result3
}






oeeSummaryTotal = array.map(arr: dateList, fn: (x) => oeeSummary(
        queryStart: x.queryStart,
        queryEnd : x.queryEnd,
        resolution : x.resolution,
        shift : x.shift,
        duration: float(v:x.duration),
        elapsed: float(v: x.elapsed),
        entityId: x.entityId,
))

union(tables: oeeSummaryTotal)`

msg.query = a
msg.dtTreshold = msTreshold


return msg;

name: function 33

name: set query
func:
const dateList = JSON.stringify(msg.payload)
const msData = global.get("TRESHOLD_DEFAULT.MINORSTOPAGE");
const id = msData.code
const effectId = msData.effectid
const msTreshold = global.get("TRESHOLD_DEFAULT.DOWNTIMES.treshold");
const defaultDt = global.get("TRESHOLD_DEFAULT.DOWNTIMES.code")
const logic = "TR"
////////////////////
// TR : Total-Reject
// GR : Good-Reject
// TG : Total-Good
var a = `
import "date"
import "contrib/tomhollingworth/events"
import "array"
import "math"

msTreshold = ${msTreshold}
effectId = "${effectId}"
reasonId = "${id}"
defaultDt = "${defaultDt}"

dateList= ${dateList}

oeeSummary = (skuId,queryStart,queryEnd,resolution,shift,duration,elapsed,entityId) => {
  startQuery = time(v:queryStart)
  endQuery = time(v:queryEnd)
  eventDurationTimeHelper = if now() > endQuery then endQuery else now()

  
  event =
  from(bucket: "[OEE] Event")
    |> range(start:  startQuery , stop :  eventDurationTimeHelper)
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "oee")
      |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] != "_time")

    |> filter(fn: (r) => if entityId == "-" then true else  r["entityId"] == entityId)
    |> filter(fn: (r) => if skuId == "-" then true else  r["skuId"] == skuId)
    |> pivot(rowKey:["_time"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
    |> sort(columns: ["_time"], desc: false)
    |> events.duration(
            unit: 1s,
            columnName: "duration",
            timeColumn: "_time",
            stopColumn: "_stop",
            stop: eventDurationTimeHelper
        )
    |> map(fn:  (r) => ({ r with 
      // effectId: if r.duration <= msTreshold and r.reasonId == defaultDt then  effectId else  r.effectId  , 
      // reasonId: if r.duration <= msTreshold and r.reasonId == defaultDt then  reasonId else r.reasonId

      effectId: if r.state == "downtime" then if r.duration <= msTreshold then  effectId else r.effectId  else r.effectId , 
      reasonId: if r.state == "downtime" then if r.duration <= msTreshold then  reasonId else r.reasonId  else r.effectId
  }))


	eventList = 
  event
    |> set(key: "resolution", value: resolution)
    |> set(key: "type", value: "event")
    |> drop(columns: ["_start", "_stop"])
    |> group(columns: ["entityId","type"])
    |> sort(columns: ["_time"], desc: true)
    
  eventSummary = 
  eventList
    |> group(columns: ["entityId","reasonId","effectId","_measurement"])
    |> reduce(fn: (r, accumulator) => ({ duration: r.duration + accumulator.duration , count: 1 + accumulator.count}), identity: {duration: 0 , count:0})
    |> drop(columns: ["_start", "_stop"])
    |> set(key: "resolution", value: resolution)
    |> set(key: "type", value: "summaryEvent")
    |> group(columns: ["entityId","type"])
    |> sort(columns: ["duration","count"], desc: true)

  eventCategory = 
  eventList
    |> group(columns: ["entityId","category","_measurement"])
    |> reduce(fn: (r, accumulator) => ({ duration: r.duration + accumulator.duration , count: 1 + accumulator.count}), identity: {duration: 0 , count:0})
    |> drop(columns: ["_start", "_stop"])
    |> set(key: "resolution", value: resolution)
    |> set(key: "type", value: "summaryDowntimeCategory")
    |> group(columns: ["entityId","type"])
    |> sort(columns: ["duration","count"], desc: true)

  AllData =
  from(bucket: "[OEE] Hourly")
    |> range(start:  if skuId == "-" then startQuery else date.truncate(t: startQuery, unit: 1h) , stop : endQuery)
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "pro")
    |> filter(fn: (r) => if entityId == "-" then true else  r["entityId"] == entityId)
    |> filter(fn: (r) => if skuId == "-" then true else  r["skuId"] == skuId)

  Data =
  AllData
    |> group(columns: ["entityId","_time","_field"])
    |> sum()
    |> group(columns: ["entityId"])
    |> sort(columns: ["_time"], desc: false)  


  hourlyData =
  Data
    |> pivot(rowKey:["_time"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
    |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with 
      resolution: resolution , 
      type : "hourlyData" ,
      _Good: (if exists r._Total then r._Total else 0.0) + (if exists r._Reject then r._Reject else 0.0)
      })
      )
    |> group(columns: ["entityId","type"])
    |> drop(columns: ["_start", "_stop"])
    |> sort(columns: ["_time"], desc: false) 

  summaryPRO =
  AllData
    |> group(columns: ["entityId","proId","_field"])
    |> sum()
    |> pivot(rowKey:["proId"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
    |> drop(columns: ["_start", "_stop"])
    |> set(key: "resolution", value: resolution)
    |> set(key: "type", value: "summaryPRO")
    |> group(columns: ["entityId","type"])
  

  dailyDefectData = 
  from(bucket: "[OEE] Defect")
    |> range(start: startQuery, stop: endQuery)
    // |> filter(fn: (r) => r.vinNumber != "")
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "defectrework")
    |> filter(fn: (r) => if entityId == "-" then true else  r["entityId"] == entityId)
    |> filter(fn: (r) => if skuId == "-" then true else  r["skuId"] == skuId)


  defectSummary = 
    dailyDefectData
    |> group(columns: ["entityId","defect_reason","_field"], mode:"by")
    |> sum()
    |> drop(columns: ["_start", "_stop"])
    |> set(key: "resolution", value: resolution)
    |> set(key: "type", value: "summaryDefect")
    |> group(columns: ["entityId","type"])
    |> sort(columns: ["_value"], desc: true)

  // defectStationSummaryCount = 
  //   dailyDefectData
  //   |> group(columns: ["entityId","station","_field"], mode:"by")
  //   |> sum()
    
  // defectStationSummaryUnit = 
  //    dailyDefectData
  //   |> group(columns: ["entityId","station","_field"], mode:"by")
  //   |> distinct(column: "vinNumber")
  //   |> count(column: "_value")
  //   |> toFloat()
  //   |> set(key: "_field", value: "unit")
    
    
  // defectStationSummary=
  //   union(tables: [defectStationSummaryUnit, defectStationSummaryCount])
  //   |> pivot(rowKey:["station"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  //   |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with dpu: r._Rework / r.unit }))
  //   |> set(key: "resolution", value: resolution)
  //   |> set(key: "type", value: "defectStationSummary")
  //   |> group(columns: ["entityId","type"])

  // result2 = union(tables: [defectStationSummary,defectSummary,hourlyData,eventList,eventSummary,eventCategory,summaryPRO])

  result2 = union(tables: [defectSummary,hourlyData,eventList,eventSummary,eventCategory,summaryPRO])
    |> group(columns: ["entityId", "type"], mode:"by")

  eventTotal = 
    event
      |> group(columns: ["entityId"])
      |> reduce(fn: (r, accumulator) => ({ 
            RUNNING :( if r.effectId == "RUNNING" then float(v: r.duration) else 0.0 )+ accumulator.RUNNING,
            PLANNED :( if r.effectId == "PLANNED" then float(v: r.duration) else 0.0 )+ accumulator.PLANNED,
            IDLE :( if r.effectId == "IDLE" then float(v: r.duration) else 0.0 )+ accumulator.IDLE,
            UNPLANNED :( if r.effectId == "UNPLANNED" then float(v: r.duration) else 0.0 )+ accumulator.UNPLANNED,
            PERFORMANCE :( if r.effectId == "PERFORMANCE" then float(v: r.duration) else 0.0 )+ accumulator.PERFORMANCE,
            MINORSTOPPAGE :( if r.effectId == "MINORSTOPPAGE" then float(v: r.duration) else 0.0 )+ accumulator.MINORSTOPPAGE,
            QUALITY :( if r.effectId == "QUALITY" then float(v: r.duration) else 0.0 )+ accumulator.QUALITY,
        }), 
            identity: {
            PERFORMANCE : 0.0,
            PLANNED : 0.0,
            UNPLANNED : 0.0,
            QUALITY : 0.0,
            IDLE : 0.0,
            RUNNING : 0.0,
            MINORSTOPPAGE : 0.0
        })

  Unit =  
    from(bucket: "[OEE] Defect")
      |> range(start: startQuery, stop: endQuery)
      |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "defectrework")
      |> filter(fn: (r) => r.vinNumber != "")
      |> filter(fn: (r) => if entityId == "-" then true else  r["entityId"] == entityId)
      |> filter(fn: (r) => if skuId == "-" then true else  r["skuId"] == skuId)
      |> group(columns: ["entityId","_field"], mode:"by")
      |> distinct(column: "vinNumber")
      |> count(column: "_value")
      |> toFloat()
  Defect = 
  from(bucket: "[OEE] Defect")
    |> range(start: startQuery, stop: endQuery)
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "defectrework")
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r.vinNumber != "")
     |> filter(fn: (r) => if entityId == "-" then true else  r["entityId"] == entityId)
    |> filter(fn: (r) => if skuId == "-" then true else  r["skuId"] == skuId)
    |> group(columns: ["entityId","_field"], mode:"by")
    |> sum(column: "_value")
    |> set(key: "_field", value: "_Defect")



  defectTotal = 
  union(tables: [Defect, Unit])

    |> group(columns: ["entityId"], mode:"by")
    |> reduce(fn: (r, accumulator) => ({ 
        _Rework: (if r._field == "_Rework" then r._value else 0.0 )+ accumulator._Rework,
        _Defect: (if r._field == "_Defect" then r._value else 0.0 )+ accumulator._Defect,
      }), 
      identity: {_Rework: 0.0 , _Defect:0.0})

  productionTotal = 
  AllData
      |> group(columns: ["entityId","_time","_field"])
      |> sum()
      |> group(columns: ["entityId"])
      |> sort(columns: ["_time"], desc: false)    
      |> drop(columns: ["_start", "_stop"])
      |> reduce(fn: (r, accumulator) => ({ 
            _Good : if r._field == "_Total" then accumulator._Good + r._value else if r._field == "_Reject" then accumulator._Good - r._value else accumulator._Good,
            _Reject : if r._field == "_Reject" then accumulator._Reject + r._value else accumulator._Reject,
            _Rework : if r._field == "_Rework" then accumulator._Rework + r._value else accumulator._Rework,
            _Defect : if r._field == "_Defect" then accumulator._Defect + r._value else accumulator._Defect,
            _Total : if r._field == "_Total" then accumulator._Total + r._value else accumulator._Total,
            _TotalLost : if r._field == "_TotalLost" then accumulator._TotalLost + r._value else accumulator._TotalLost
        }), 
            identity: {
            _TotalLost : 0.0,
            _Reject : 0.0,
            _Rework : 0.0,
            _Defect : 0.0,
            _Good : 0.0,
            _Total : 0.0
        })

  result = 
  union(tables: [eventTotal,productionTotal,defectTotal])
    |> reduce(fn: (r, accumulator) => ({ 
          availableTime: float(v:duration),
          PERFORMANCE : if exists r.PERFORMANCE then r.PERFORMANCE else accumulator.PERFORMANCE ,
          PLANNED : if exists r.PLANNED then r.PLANNED else accumulator.PLANNED ,
          UNPLANNED : if exists r.UNPLANNED then r.UNPLANNED else accumulator.UNPLANNED ,
          QUALITY : if exists r.QUALITY then r.QUALITY else accumulator.QUALITY ,
          IDLE : if exists r.IDLE  then r.IDLE else accumulator.IDLE ,
          RUNNING : if exists r.RUNNING  then r.RUNNING else accumulator.RUNNING ,
          MINORSTOPPAGE : if exists r.MINORSTOPPAGE  then r.MINORSTOPPAGE else accumulator.MINORSTOPPAGE ,
          _Good : if exists r._Good  then  r._Good else accumulator._Good,
          _Reject : if exists r._Reject  then  r._Reject else accumulator._Reject,
          _Total : if exists r._Total then r._Total else accumulator._Total,
          _Defect : if exists r._Defect then  r._Defect else accumulator._Defect,
          _Rework :if exists r._Rework then  r._Rework else accumulator._Rework,
          _TargetProduction :if exists r._TotalLost then  math.round(x:r._TotalLost) else math.round(x:accumulator._TargetProduction)
      }), 
          identity: {
          PERFORMANCE : 0.0,
          PLANNED : 0.0,
          UNPLANNED : 0.0,
          QUALITY : 0.0,
          IDLE : 0.0,
          RUNNING : 0.0,
          MINORSTOPPAGE : 0.0,
          _Reject : 0.0,
          _Good : 0.0,
          _Total : 0.0,
          _Defect : 0.0,
          _Rework : 0.0 , 
          _TargetProduction : 0.0,
          availableTime: 0.0
      })
    |> map(
      fn: (r) => ({r with
          elapsed:if elapsed > duration then duration else elapsed,
          availibilityLoss : r.UNPLANNED,
          target_cycle_time : math.round(x:  (r._TargetProduction) / elapsed * 60.0),
          plannedProductiveTime : r.availableTime - r.PLANNED - r.IDLE,
          }),
      )
    |> map(
      fn: (r) => ({r with
          avg_cycle_time : math.round(x: r._Total / elapsed * 60.0),
          operatingTime : r.plannedProductiveTime - r.availibilityLoss,
          right_first_time : if r._Total - r._Reject - r._Rework == 0.0 then 0.0 else math.round(x:  (r._Total - r._Reject - r._Rework)  /  r._Total  * 100.0),
          quality_rate : if r._Total- r._Reject == 0.0 then 0.0 else math.round(x: (r._Total- r._Reject )  / r._Total * 100.0),
          dpu: if r._Defect == 0.0 or r._Total == 0.0 then 0.0 else r._Defect / r._Total,
          per_loss_time : r.elapsed - r.PLANNED - r.UNPLANNED - r.PERFORMANCE - r.MINORSTOPPAGE - (if r._Total == 0.0 or r._TargetProduction == 0.0 then 0.0 else math.round(x:( r._Total / r._TargetProduction * elapsed)))
        }),
    )
    |> map(
      fn: (r) => ({r with
        up_speed : if r.per_loss_time < 0.0 then math.abs(x: r.per_loss_time) else 0.0 ,
        per_loss_time : if r.per_loss_time < 0.0 then 0.0 else r.per_loss_time
        }),
    )
    |> map(
      fn: (r) => ({r with
          performance_loss : r.per_loss_time + r.up_speed + r.PERFORMANCE + r.MINORSTOPPAGE,
          quality_loss : if r.QUALITY + r._Reject +r._Rework == 0.0 then 0.0 else (r.QUALITY + r._Reject +r._Rework) / r.target_cycle_time
          }),
      )
    |> map(
      fn: (r) => ({r with
          netOperatingTime : r.operatingTime - r.performance_loss,
          fullyProductiveTime : r.operatingTime - r.performance_loss
          }),
      )
    |> map(
      fn: (r) => ({r with
          availability : if exists r.operatingTime then  math.round(x: r.operatingTime / r.plannedProductiveTime * 100.0) else 0.0,
          performance : if exists r.netOperatingTime then  math.round(x: r.netOperatingTime / r.operatingTime * 100.0) else 0.0,
          quality : if exists r.fullyProductiveTime then  math.round(x: r.fullyProductiveTime / r.netOperatingTime * 100.0) else 0.0,
          oee : if exists r.fullyProductiveTime then  math.round(x: r.fullyProductiveTime / r.plannedProductiveTime * 100.0) else 0.0,
          }),
      )
    |> set(key: "resolution", value: resolution)
    |> set(key: "type", value: "summaryOEE")
    |> set(key: "start", value: string(v: startQuery))
    |> set(key: "end", value: string(v: endQuery))
    |> set(key: "shift", value: string(v: shift))  
    |> group(columns: ["entityId","type"])
 
  result3 = union(tables: [
      result,
      result2
      ]
) 
	return result3
}
oeeSummaryTotal = array.map(arr: dateList, fn: (x) => oeeSummary(
  queryStart: x.queryStart,
  queryEnd : x.queryEnd,
  resolution : x.resolution,
  shift : x.shift,
  duration: float(v:x.duration),
  elapsed: float(v: x.elapsed),
  entityId: x.entityId,
  skuId: x.skuId
))

union(tables: oeeSummaryTotal)
`

msg.queryData = msg.query
msg.dtTreshold = msTreshold
msg.queryTime = moment()
msg.query = a

return msg;

Yes, there are some parts of the query that can be simplified to enhance performance:

1. Filter Optimization: In multiple places, there are filter conditions that check if a particular field is equal to a specific value. Instead of using conditional filters, you can use the `==` operator directly in the `filter` function.

2. Removing Unnecessary Operations: There are some commented out parts of the query that are not being used. Removing these unused operations can help improve query performance.

3. Unnecessary Sorting: In the `eventList` and `hourlyData` sections, you are sorting the data by `_time` in ascending order. If the data is already sorted in the desired order or if the order doesn't matter, you can remove the sorting operation to save computation time.

4. Optimization in Grouping: In some cases, you are using `group` functions without specifying the `mode`. The default `mode` is `"by"` which is not required here. You can remove the `mode: "by"` parameter to improve performance.

5. Redundant Mapping: In the final part of the query, you are using multiple `map` functions one after the other. You can combine these `map` operations into a single `map` function to avoid unnecessary iterations over the data.

6. Conditional Mappings: In some `map` functions, you have conditions like `if exists r.operatingTime then ... else 0.0`. Instead of using `if exists`, you can use the `coalesce()` function to get the value or a default value if it's missing.

7. Limiting Data Range: In the `from` functions, try to specify the exact data range you need instead of querying all data within the specified time range. This can reduce the amount of data to process and improve query performance.

8. Using `merge()` Function: In the part where you are creating `event`, consider using the `merge()` function instead of multiple separate `map` functions. The `merge()` function combines multiple objects into one, which can help improve readability and potentially performance.

These optimizations might vary depending on the actual data and use case, so it's always recommended to test the performance impact of each change on real data to measure the actual improvement. Additionally, be sure to check the execution plan to see how the Flux engine processes the query and identify any potential bottlenecks.

This part calculates the summary of "AllData" by "proId" and generates "summaryPRO" with aggregated data.

```flux
dailyDefectData = 
  from(bucket: "[OEE] Defect")
    |> range(start: startQuery, stop: endQuery)
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "defectrework")
    |> filter(fn: (r) => if entityId == "-" then true else  r["entityId"] == entityId)
    |> filter(fn: (r) => if skuId == "-" then true else  r["skuId"] == skuId)
```

This part fetches data from the "[OEE] Defect" bucket, filters it based on various conditions, and stores it in the "dailyDefectData" variable.

```flux
defectSummary =
```

This part calculates the summary of "dailyDefectData" by "defect_reason" and generates "defectSummary" with aggregated data.

```flux
defectTotal =

        _Rework: (if r._field == "_Rework" then r._value else 0.0 )+ accumulator._Rework,
```

This part calculates the total defects and rework from "dailyDefectData" and "Unit" data and generates "defectTotal" with aggregated data.

```flux
productionTotal = 
  AllData
      |> group(columns: ["entityId","_time","_field"])
      |> sum()
      |> group(columns: ["entityId"])
      |> sort(columns: ["_time"], desc: false)    
      |> drop(columns: ["_start", "_stop"])
      |> reduce(fn: (r, accumulator) => ({ 
            _Good : if r._field == "_Total" then accumulator._Good + r._value else if r._field == "_Reject" then accumulator._Good - r._value else accumulator._Good,
            _Reject : if r._field == "_Reject" then accumulator._Reject + r._value else accumulator._Reject,
            _Rework : if r._field == "_Rework" then accumulator._Rework + r._value else accumulator._Rework,
            _Defect : if r._field == "_Defect" then accumulator._Defect + r._value else accumulator._Defect,
            _Total : if r._field == "_Total" then accumulator._Total + r._value else accumulator._Total,
            _TotalLost : if r._field == "_TotalLost" then accumulator._TotalLost + r._value else accumulator._TotalLost
        }), 
            identity: {
            _TotalLost : 0.0,
            _Reject : 0.0,
            _Rework : 0.0,


            _Defect : 0.0,
            _Good : 0.0,
            _Total : 0.0
        })
```

This part calculates the total production data from "AllData" and generates "productionTotal" with aggregated data.

```flux
result = 
  union(tables: [eventTotal,productionTotal,defectTotal])
    |> reduce(fn: (r, accumulator) => ({ 
          availableTime: float(v:duration),

          PLANNED : if exists r.PLANNED then r.PLANNED else accumulator.PLANNED ,
          UNPLANNED : if exists r.UNPLANNED then r.UNPLANNED else accumulator.UNPLANNED ,
          QUALITY : if exists r.QUALITY then r.QUALITY else accumulator.QUALITY ,
          IDLE : if exists r.IDLE  then r.IDLE else accumulator.IDLE ,
          RUNNING : if exists r.RUNNING  then r.RUNNING else accumulator.RUNNING ,
          MINORSTOPPAGE : if exists r.MINORSTOPPAGE  then r.MINORSTOPPAGE else accumulator.MINORSTOPPAGE ,
          _Good : if exists r._Good  then  r._Good else accumulator._Good,
          _Reject : if exists r._Reject  then  r._Reject else accumulator._Reject,
          _Total : if exists r._Total then r._Total else accumulator._Total,
          _Defect : if exists r._Defect then  r._Defect else accumulator._Defect,
          _Rework : if exists r._Rework then  r._Rework else accumulator._Rework,
          _TargetProduction :if exists r._TotalLost then  math.round(x:r._TotalLost) else math.round(x:accumulator._TargetProduction)
      }), 
          identity: {
          PERFORMANCE : 0.0,
          PLANNED : 0.0,
          UNPLANNED : 0.0,
          QUALITY : 0.0,
          IDLE : 0.0,
          RUNNING : 0.0,
          MINORSTOPPAGE : 0.0,
          _Reject : 0.0,
          _Good : 0.0,
          _Total : 0.0,
          _Defect : 0.0,
          _Rework : 0.0 , 
          _TargetProduction : 0.0,
          availableTime: 0.0
      })
```

This part unions the results from "eventTotal", "productionTotal", and "defectTotal" and generates "result" with aggregated data.

```flux
result2 = union(tables: [defectSummary,hourlyData,eventList,eventSummary,eventCategory,summaryPRO])
    |> group(columns: ["entityId", "type"], mode:"by")
```

This part unions the results from various summary tables and groups the data by "entityId" and "type" to generate "result2."

```flux

      result,

      ]
) 
	return result3
}
```

This part unions "result" and "result2" and stores the final combined result in "result3."

```flux
oeeSummaryTotal = array.map(arr: dateList, fn: (x) => oeeSummary(
  queryStart: x.queryStart,
  queryEnd : x.queryEnd,
```

Finally, the query unions all the individual results in "oeeSummaryTotal" to obtain the final output. The result should be a combined dataset that contains various OEE-related metrics for different entities and time periods.

name: set query
func:
const dateList = JSON.stringify(msg.payload)
const msData = global.get("MINORSTOP_DEFAULT");
const id = msData.id
const effectId = msData.effectid
const msTreshold = global.get("DOWNTIME_DEFAULT.treshold");

var a = `
import "date"
import "contrib/tomhollingworth/events"
import "array"
import "math"

msTreshold = ${msTreshold}
effectId = "${id}"
reasonId = "${effectId}"

dateList= ${dateList}


oeeSummary = (queryStart,queryEnd,resolution,shift,duration,elapsed,entityId) => {
  startQuery = time(v:queryStart)
  endQuery = time(v:queryEnd)

  
  event =
  from(bucket: "[OEE] Event")
    |> range(start:  startQuery , stop : now())
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "oee")
    |> filter(fn: (r) => if entityId == "-" then true else  r["entityId"] == entityId)
    |> pivot(rowKey:["_time"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
    |> events.duration(
            unit: 1s,
            columnName: "duration",
            timeColumn: "_time",
            stopColumn: "_stop",
            stop: now()
        )
    |> map(fn:  (r) => ({ r with 
      effectId: if r.duration < msTreshold and r.state == "start" then  effectId else  r.effectId  , 
      reasonId: if r.duration < msTreshold and r.state == "start" then  reasonId else r.reasonId
  }))


	eventList = 
  event
    |> set(key: "resolution", value: resolution)
    |> set(key: "type", value: "event")
    |> drop(columns: ["_start", "_stop"])
    |> group(columns: ["entityId","type"])
    
  eventSummary = 
  eventList
    |> group(columns: ["entityId","reasonId","_measurement"])
    |> reduce(fn: (r, accumulator) => ({ duration: r.duration + accumulator.duration , count: 1 + accumulator.count}), identity: {duration: 0 , count:0})
    |> drop(columns: ["_start", "_stop"])
    |> set(key: "resolution", value: resolution)
    |> set(key: "type", value: "summaryEvent")
    |> group(columns: ["entityId","type"])


  AllData =
  from(bucket: "[OEE] Hourly")
    |> range(start:  startQuery , stop : endQuery)
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "oee")
    |> filter(fn: (r) => if entityId == "-" then true else  r["entityId"] == entityId)


  Data =
  AllData
    |> group(columns: ["entityId","_time","_field"])
    |> sum()
    |> group(columns: ["entityId"])
    |> sort(columns: ["_time"], desc: false)  


  hourlyData =
  Data
    |> pivot(rowKey:["_time"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
    |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with resolution: resolution , type : "hourlyData" , _Total: (if exists r._Good then r._Good else 0.0) + (if exists r._Reject then r._Reject else 0.0)}))
    |> group(columns: ["entityId","type"])
    |> drop(columns: ["_start", "_stop"])
    |> sort(columns: ["_time"], desc: false) 


  dailyDefectData = 
  from(bucket: "[OEE] Realtime")
    |> range(start: startQuery, stop: endQuery)
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "defectrework")
    |> filter(fn: (r) => if entityId == "-" then true else  r["entityId"] == entityId)


  defectSummary = 
    dailyDefectData
    |> group(columns: ["entityId","defect_reason","_field"], mode:"by")
    |> sum()
    |> drop(columns: ["_start", "_stop"])
    |> set(key: "resolution", value: resolution)
    |> set(key: "type", value: "summaryDefect")
    |> group(columns: ["entityId","type"])

  result2 = union(tables: [defectSummary,hourlyData,eventList,eventSummary])
    |> group(columns: ["entityId", "type"], mode:"by")

  eventTotal = 
    from(bucket: "[OEE] Event")
      |> range(start:  startQuery , stop : now())
      |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "oee")
      |> filter(fn: (r) => if entityId == "-" then true else  r["entityId"] == entityId)
      |> pivot(rowKey:["_time"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
      |> events.duration(
              unit: 1s,
              columnName: "duration",
              timeColumn: "_time",
              stopColumn: "_stop",
              stop: now()
          )
      |> map(fn:  (r) => ({ r with 
        effectId: if r.duration < msTreshold and r.state == "start" then  effectId else  r.effectId  , 
        reasonId: if r.duration < msTreshold and r.state == "start" then  reasonId else r.reasonId
        }))
      |> group(columns: ["entityId"])
      |> reduce(fn: (r, accumulator) => ({ 
            RUNNING :( if r.effectId == "RUNNING" then float(v: r.duration) else 0.0 )+ accumulator.RUNNING,
            PLANNED :( if r.effectId == "2" then float(v: r.duration) else 0.0 )+ accumulator.PLANNED,
            IDLE :( if r.effectId == "5" then float(v: r.duration) else 0.0 )+ accumulator.IDLE,
            UNPLANNED :( if r.effectId == "3" then float(v: r.duration) else 0.0 )+ accumulator.UNPLANNED,
            PERFORMANCE :( if r.effectId == "1" then float(v: r.duration) else 0.0 )+ accumulator.PERFORMANCE,
            MINORSTOPPAGE :( if r.effectId == "7" then float(v: r.duration) else 0.0 )+ accumulator.MINORSTOPPAGE,
            QUALITY :( if r.effectId == "4" then float(v: r.duration) else 0.0 )+ accumulator.QUALITY,
        }), 
            identity: {
            PERFORMANCE : 0.0,
            PLANNED : 0.0,
            UNPLANNED : 0.0,
            QUALITY : 0.0,
            IDLE : 0.0,
            RUNNING : 0.0,
            MINORSTOPPAGE : 0.0
        })

  defectTotal = 
  from(bucket: "[OEE] Realtime")
    |> range(start: startQuery, stop: endQuery)
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "defectrework")
    |> filter(fn: (r) => if entityId == "-" then true else  r["entityId"] == entityId)
    |> group(columns: ["entityId","_field"], mode:"by")
    |> sum(column: "_value")
    |> group(columns: ["entityId"], mode:"by")
    |> reduce(fn: (r, accumulator) => ({ 
        _Rework: (if r._field == "_Rework" then r._value else 0.0 )+ accumulator._Rework,
        _Defect: (if r._field == "_Reject" then r._value else 0.0 )+ accumulator._Defect,
      }), 
      identity: {_Rework: 0.0 , _Defect:0.0})

  productionTotal = 
  from(bucket: "[OEE] Hourly")
      |> range(start:  startQuery , stop : endQuery)
      |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "oee")
      |> filter(fn: (r) => if entityId == "-" then true else  r["entityId"] == entityId)
      |> group(columns: ["entityId","_time","_field"])
      |> sum()
      |> group(columns: ["entityId"])
      |> sort(columns: ["_time"], desc: false)    
      |> drop(columns: ["_start", "_stop"])
      |> reduce(fn: (r, accumulator) => ({ 
            _Good : if r._field == "_Good" then accumulator._Good + r._value else accumulator._Good,
            _Reject : if r._field == "_Reject" then accumulator._Reject + r._value else accumulator._Reject,
            _Total : if r._field == "_Good" or  r._field == "_Reject" then accumulator._Total + r._value else  accumulator._Total,
            _TotalLost : if r._field == "_TotalLost" then accumulator._TotalLost + r._value else accumulator._TotalLost
        }), 
            identity: {
            _TotalLost : 0.0,
            _Reject : 0.0,
            _Good : 0.0,
            _Total : 0.0
        })

  result = 
  union(tables: [eventTotal,productionTotal,defectTotal])
    |> reduce(fn: (r, accumulator) => ({ 
          availableTime: float(v:duration),
          PERFORMANCE : if exists r.PERFORMANCE then r.PERFORMANCE else accumulator.PERFORMANCE ,
          PLANNED : if exists r.PLANNED then r.PLANNED else accumulator.PLANNED ,
          UNPLANNED : if exists r.UNPLANNED then r.UNPLANNED else accumulator.UNPLANNED ,
          QUALITY : if exists r.QUALITY then r.QUALITY else accumulator.QUALITY ,
          IDLE : if exists r.IDLE  then r.IDLE else accumulator.IDLE ,
          RUNNING : if exists r.RUNNING  then r.RUNNING else accumulator.RUNNING ,
          MINORSTOPPAGE : if exists r.MINORSTOPPAGE  then r.MINORSTOPPAGE else accumulator.MINORSTOPPAGE ,
          _Good : if exists r._Good  then  r._Good else accumulator._Good,
          _Reject : if exists r._Reject  then  r._Reject else accumulator._Reject,
          _Total : if exists r._Total then r._Total else accumulator._Total,
          _Defect : if exists r._Defect then  r._Defect else accumulator._Defect,
          _Rework :if exists r._Rework then  r._Rework else accumulator._Rework,
          _TargetProduction :if exists r._TotalLost then  r._TotalLost else accumulator._TargetProduction
      }), 
          identity: {
          PERFORMANCE : 0.0,
          PLANNED : 0.0,
          UNPLANNED : 0.0,
          QUALITY : 0.0,
          IDLE : 0.0,
          RUNNING : 0.0,
          MINORSTOPPAGE : 0.0,
          _Reject : 0.0,
          _Good : 0.0,
          _Total : 0.0,
          _Defect : 0.0,
          _Rework : 0.0 , 
          _TargetProduction : 0.0,
          availableTime: 0.0
      })
    |> map(
      fn: (r) => ({r with
          target_actual_production: r._TargetProduction,
          duration: r.duration,
          elapsed:elapsed,
          availibilityLoss : r.UNPLANNED,
          right_first_time : math.round(x:  r._Total  /  (r._Total + r._Defect + r._Rework) * 100.0),
          quality_rate : math.round(x: r._Total  / (r._Total+ r._Defect ) * 100.0),
          target_cycle_time : math.round(x:  (r._TargetProduction) / elapsed * 60.0),
          avg_cycle_time : math.round(x:  (r._Total + r._Defect + r._Rework) / elapsed * 60.0),
          plannedProductiveTime : r.availableTime - r.PLANNED - r.IDLE,
          _Total: (r._Total + r._Defect + r._Rework -r._Reject),
          per_loss_time : r._Total / (r._TargetProduction / elapsed  )
          })
      )
    |> map(
      fn: (r) => ({r with
          operatingTime : r.plannedProductiveTime - r.availibilityLoss,
          performance_loss : math.abs(x: r.PERFORMANCE + r.MINORSTOPPAGE + r.plannedProductiveTime - r.availibilityLoss - r.per_loss_time)
          }),
      )
    |> map(
      fn: (r) => ({r with
          netOperatingTime : r.operatingTime - r.performance_loss,
          quality_loss : r.QUALITY + r._Defect +r._Rework
          }),
      )
    |> map(
      fn: (r) => ({r with
          fullyProductiveTime : r.netOperatingTime 
          }),
      )
    |> map(
      fn: (r) => ({r with
          availability : math.round(x: r.operatingTime / r.plannedProductiveTime * 100.0),
          performance : math.round(x: r.netOperatingTime / r.operatingTime * 100.0),
          quality : math.round(x: r.fullyProductiveTime / r.netOperatingTime * 100.0),
          }),
      )
    |> map(
      fn: (r) => ({r with
          oee : math.round(x: r.fullyProductiveTime / r.plannedProductiveTime * 100.0)
          }),
      )
    |> set(key: "resolution", value: resolution)
    |> set(key: "type", value: "summaryOEE")
    |> set(key: "start", value: string(v: startQuery))
    |> set(key: "end", value: string(v: endQuery))
    |> set(key: "shift", value: string(v: shift))  
    |> group(columns: ["entityId","type"])
 
  result3 = union(tables: [
      result,
      result2
      ]
) 
	return result3
}






oeeSummaryTotal = array.map(arr: dateList, fn: (x) => oeeSummary(
        queryStart: x.queryStart,
        queryEnd : x.queryEnd,
        resolution : x.resolution,
        shift : x.shift,
        duration: float(v:x.duration),
        elapsed: float(v: x.elapsed),
        entityId: x.entityId,
))

union(tables: oeeSummaryTotal)`

msg.query = a
msg.dtTreshold = msTreshold


return msg;

const msData = global.get("MINORSTOP_DEFAULT");
const id = msData.id
const effectId = msData.effectid
const msTreshold = global.get("DOWNTIME_DEFAULT.treshold");

var a = `
import "date"
import "contrib/tomhollingworth/events"
import "array"
import "math"

msTreshold = ${msTreshold}
effectId = "${id}"
reasonId = "${effectId}"

dateList= ${dateList}


oeeSummary = (queryStart,queryEnd,resolution,shift,duration,elapsed,entityId) => {
  startQuery = time(v:queryStart)
  endQuery = time(v:queryEnd)

  
  event =
  from(bucket: "[OEE] Event")
    |> range(start:  startQuery , stop : now())
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "oee")
    |> filter(fn: (r) => if entityId == "-" then true else  r["entityId"] == entityId)
    |> pivot(rowKey:["_time"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
    |> events.duration(
            unit: 1s,
            columnName: "duration",
            timeColumn: "_time",
            stopColumn: "_stop",
            stop: now()
        )
    |> map(fn:  (r) => ({ r with 
      effectId: if r.duration < msTreshold and r.state == "start" then  effectId else  r.effectId  , 
      reasonId: if r.duration < msTreshold and r.state == "start" then  reasonId else r.reasonId
  }))


	eventList = 
  event
    |> set(key: "resolution", value: resolution)
    |> set(key: "type", value: "event")
    |> drop(columns: ["_start", "_stop"])
    |> group(columns: ["entityId","type"])
  eventSummary = 
  eventList
    |> group(columns: ["entityId","reasonId","_measurement"])
    |> reduce(fn: (r, accumulator) => ({ duration: r.duration + accumulator.duration , count: 1 + accumulator.count}), identity: {duration: 0 , count:0})
    |> drop(columns: ["_start", "_stop"])
    |> set(key: "resolution", value: resolution)
    |> set(key: "type", value: "summaryEvent")
    |> group(columns: ["entityId","type"])


  AllData =
  from(bucket: "[OEE] Hourly")
    |> range(start:  startQuery , stop : endQuery)
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "oee")
    |> filter(fn: (r) => if entityId == "-" then true else  r["entityId"] == entityId)


  Data =
  AllData
    |> group(columns: ["entityId","_time","_field"])
    |> sum()
    |> group(columns: ["entityId"])
    |> sort(columns: ["_time"], desc: false)  


  hourlyData =
  Data
    |> pivot(rowKey:["_time"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
    |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with resolution: resolution , type : "hourlyData" , _Total: (if exists r._Good then r._Good else 0.0) + (if exists r._Reject then r._Reject else 0.0)}))
    |> group(columns: ["entityId","type"])
    |> drop(columns: ["_start", "_stop"])
    |> sort(columns: ["_time"], desc: false) 


  dailyDefectData = 
  from(bucket: "[OEE] Realtime")
    |> range(start: startQuery, stop: endQuery)
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "defectrework")
    |> filter(fn: (r) => if entityId == "-" then true else  r["entityId"] == entityId)


  defectHourly = 
    dailyDefectData
    |> group(columns: ["entityId","_field","reasonId","defect_reason"], mode:"by")
    |> aggregateWindow(every: 1h, fn: sum)
    |> fill(value: 0.0)
    |> reduce(fn: (r, accumulator) => ({ 
        _Rework: (if r._field == "_Rework" then r._value else 0.0 )+ accumulator._Rework,
        _Defect: (if r._field == "_Reject" then r._value else 0.0 )+ accumulator._Defect,
      }), 
    |> drop(columns: ["_start", "_stop","_measurement"])
    |> rename(columns: {_Reject: "_Defect"})
    |> set(key: "resolution", value: resolution)
    |> set(key: "type", value: "defecthourly")
    |> group(columns: ["entityId","type"])


  defectSummary = 
    dailyDefectData
    |> group(columns: ["entityId","defect_reason","_field"], mode:"by")
    |> sum()
    |> drop(columns: ["_start", "_stop"])
    |> set(key: "resolution", value: resolution)
    |> set(key: "type", value: "summaryDefect")
    |> group(columns: ["entityId","type"])

  result2 = union(tables: [defectSummary,defectHourly,hourlyData,eventList,eventSummary])
    |> group(columns: ["entityId", "type"], mode:"by")

  eventTotal = 
    from(bucket: "[OEE] Event")
      |> range(start:  startQuery , stop : now())
      |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "oee")
      |> filter(fn: (r) => if entityId == "-" then true else  r["entityId"] == entityId)
      |> pivot(rowKey:["_time"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
      |> events.duration(
              unit: 1s,
              columnName: "duration",
              timeColumn: "_time",

          )

        }))
      |> group(columns: ["entityId"])
