name: set query
func:
const dateList = JSON.stringify(msg.payload)
const msData = global.get("MINORSTOP_DEFAULT");
const id = msData.id
const effectId = msData.effectid
const msTreshold = global.get("DOWNTIME_DEFAULT.treshold");

var a = `
import "date"
import "contrib/tomhollingworth/events"
import "array"
import "math"

msTreshold = ${msTreshold}
effectId = "${id}"
reasonId = "${effectId}"

dateList= ${dateList}


oeeSummary = (queryStart,queryEnd,resolution,shift,duration,elapsed,entityId) => {
  startQuery = time(v:queryStart)
  endQuery = time(v:queryEnd)

  
  event =
  from(bucket: "[OEE] Event")
    |> range(start:  startQuery , stop : now())
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "oee")
    |> filter(fn: (r) => if entityId == "-" then true else  r["entityId"] == entityId)
    |> pivot(rowKey:["_time"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
    |> events.duration(
            unit: 1s,
            columnName: "duration",
            timeColumn: "_time",
            stopColumn: "_stop",
            stop: now()
        )
    |> map(fn:  (r) => ({ r with 
      effectId: if r.duration < msTreshold and r.state == "start" then  effectId else  r.effectId  , 
      reasonId: if r.duration < msTreshold and r.state == "start" then  reasonId else r.reasonId
  }))


	eventList = 
  event
    |> set(key: "resolution", value: resolution)
    |> set(key: "type", value: "event")
    |> drop(columns: ["_start", "_stop"])
    |> group(columns: ["entityId","type"])
  eventSummary = 
  eventList
    |> group(columns: ["entityId","reasonId","_measurement"])
    |> reduce(fn: (r, accumulator) => ({ duration: r.duration + accumulator.duration , count: 1 + accumulator.count}), identity: {duration: 0 , count:0})
    |> drop(columns: ["_start", "_stop"])
    |> set(key: "resolution", value: resolution)
    |> set(key: "type", value: "summaryEvent")
    |> group(columns: ["entityId","type"])


  AllData =
  from(bucket: "[OEE] Hourly")
    |> range(start:  startQuery , stop : endQuery)
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "oee")
    |> filter(fn: (r) => if entityId == "-" then true else  r["entityId"] == entityId)


  Data =
  AllData
    |> group(columns: ["entityId","_time","_field"])
    |> sum()
    |> group(columns: ["entityId"])
    |> sort(columns: ["_time"], desc: false)  


  hourlyData =
  Data
    |> pivot(rowKey:["_time"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
    |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with resolution: resolution , type : "hourlyData" , _Total: (if exists r._Good then r._Good else 0.0) + (if exists r._Reject then r._Reject else 0.0)}))
    |> group(columns: ["entityId","type"])
    |> drop(columns: ["_start", "_stop"])
    |> sort(columns: ["_time"], desc: false) 


  dailyDefectData = 
  from(bucket: "[OEE] Realtime")
    |> range(start: startQuery, stop: endQuery)
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "defectrework")
    |> filter(fn: (r) => if entityId == "-" then true else  r["entityId"] == entityId)


  defectHourly = 
    dailyDefectData
    |> group(columns: ["entityId","_field","reasonId","defect_reason"], mode:"by")
    |> aggregateWindow(every: 1h, fn: sum)
    |> fill(value: 0.0)
    |> reduce(fn: (r, accumulator) => ({ 
        _Rework: (if r._field == "_Rework" then r._value else 0.0 )+ accumulator._Rework,
        _Defect: (if r._field == "_Reject" then r._value else 0.0 )+ accumulator._Defect,
      }), 
    |> drop(columns: ["_start", "_stop","_measurement"])
    |> rename(columns: {_Reject: "_Defect"})
    |> set(key: "resolution", value: resolution)
    |> set(key: "type", value: "defecthourly")
    |> group(columns: ["entityId","type"])


  defectSummary = 
    dailyDefectData
    |> group(columns: ["entityId","defect_reason","_field"], mode:"by")
    |> sum()
    |> drop(columns: ["_start", "_stop"])
    |> set(key: "resolution", value: resolution)
    |> set(key: "type", value: "summaryDefect")
    |> group(columns: ["entityId","type"])

  result2 = union(tables: [defectSummary,defectHourly,hourlyData,eventList,eventSummary])
    |> group(columns: ["entityId", "type"], mode:"by")

  eventTotal = 
    from(bucket: "[OEE] Event")
      |> range(start:  startQuery , stop : now())
      |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "oee")
      |> filter(fn: (r) => if entityId == "-" then true else  r["entityId"] == entityId)
      |> pivot(rowKey:["_time"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
      |> events.duration(
              unit: 1s,
              columnName: "duration",
              timeColumn: "_time",
              stopColumn: "_stop",
              stop: now()
          )
      |> map(fn:  (r) => ({ r with 
        effectId: if r.duration < msTreshold and r.state == "start" then  effectId else  r.effectId  , 
        reasonId: if r.duration < msTreshold and r.state == "start" then  reasonId else r.reasonId
        }))
      |> group(columns: ["entityId"])
      |> reduce(fn: (r, accumulator) => ({ 
            RUNNING :( if r.effectId == "RUNNING" then float(v: r.duration) else 0.0 )+ accumulator.RUNNING,
            PLANNED :( if r.effectId == "2" then float(v: r.duration) else 0.0 )+ accumulator.PLANNED,
            IDLE :( if r.effectId == "17" then float(v: r.duration) else 0.0 )+ accumulator.IDLE,
            UNPLANNED :( if r.effectId == "3" then float(v: r.duration) else 0.0 )+ accumulator.UNPLANNED,
            PERFORMANCE :( if r.effectId == "1" then float(v: r.duration) else 0.0 )+ accumulator.PERFORMANCE,
            MINORSTOPPAGE :( if r.effectId == "19" then float(v: r.duration) else 0.0 )+ accumulator.MINORSTOPPAGE,
            QUALITY :( if r.effectId == "4" then float(v: r.duration) else 0.0 )+ accumulator.QUALITY,
        }), 
            identity: {
            PERFORMANCE : 0.0,
            PLANNED : 0.0,
            UNPLANNED : 0.0,
            QUALITY : 0.0,
            IDLE : 0.0,
            RUNNING : 0.0,
            MINORSTOPPAGE : 0.0
        })

  defectTotal = 
  from(bucket: "[OEE] Realtime")
    |> range(start: startQuery, stop: endQuery)
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "defectrework")
    |> filter(fn: (r) => if entityId == "-" then true else  r["entityId"] == entityId)
    |> group(columns: ["entityId"], mode:"by")
    |> reduce(fn: (r, accumulator) => ({ 
        _Rework: (if r._field == "_Rework" then r._value else 0.0 )+ accumulator._Rework,
        _Defect: (if r._field == "_Reject" then r._value else 0.0 )+ accumulator._Defect,
      }), 
      identity: {_Rework: 0.0 , _Defect:0.0})

  productionTotal = 
  from(bucket: "[OEE] Hourly")
      |> range(start:  startQuery , stop : endQuery)
      |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "oee")
      |> filter(fn: (r) => if entityId == "-" then true else  r["entityId"] == entityId)
      |> group(columns: ["entityId","_time","_field"])
      |> sum()
      |> group(columns: ["entityId"])
      |> sort(columns: ["_time"], desc: false)    
      |> drop(columns: ["_start", "_stop"])
      |> reduce(fn: (r, accumulator) => ({ 
            _Good : if r._field == "_Good" then accumulator._Good + r._value else accumulator._Good,
            _Reject : if r._field == "_Reject" then accumulator._Reject + r._value else accumulator._Reject,
            _Total : if r._field == "_Good" or  r._field == "_Reject" then accumulator._Total + r._value else  accumulator._Total,
            _TotalLost : if r._field == "_TotalLost" then accumulator._TotalLost + r._value else accumulator._TotalLost
        }), 
            identity: {
            _TotalLost : 0.0,
            _Reject : 0.0,
            _Good : 0.0,
            _Total : 0.0
        })

  result = 
  union(tables: [eventTotal,productionTotal,defectTotal])
    |> reduce(fn: (r, accumulator) => ({ 
          availableTime: float(v:duration),
          PERFORMANCE : if exists r.PERFORMANCE then r.PERFORMANCE else accumulator.PERFORMANCE ,
          PLANNED : if exists r.PLANNED then r.PLANNED else accumulator.PLANNED ,
          UNPLANNED : if exists r.UNPLANNED then r.UNPLANNED else accumulator.UNPLANNED ,
          QUALITY : if exists r.QUALITY then r.QUALITY else accumulator.QUALITY ,
          IDLE : if exists r.IDLE  then r.IDLE else accumulator.IDLE ,
          RUNNING : if exists r.RUNNING  then r.RUNNING else accumulator.RUNNING ,
          MINORSTOPPAGE : if exists r.MINORSTOPPAGE  then r.MINORSTOPPAGE else accumulator.MINORSTOPPAGE ,
          _Good : if exists r._Good  then  r._Good else accumulator._Good,
          _Reject : if exists r._Reject  then  r._Reject else accumulator._Reject,
          _Total : if exists r._Total then r._Total else accumulator._Total,
          _Defect : if exists r._Defect then  r._Defect else accumulator._Defect,
          _Rework :if exists r._Rework then  r._Rework else accumulator._Rework,
          _TargetProduction :if exists r._TotalLost then  r._TotalLost else accumulator._TargetProduction
      }), 
          identity: {
          PERFORMANCE : 0.0,
          PLANNED : 0.0,
          UNPLANNED : 0.0,
          QUALITY : 0.0,
          IDLE : 0.0,
          RUNNING : 0.0,
          MINORSTOPPAGE : 0.0,
          _Reject : 0.0,
          _Good : 0.0,
          _Total : 0.0,
          _Defect : 0.0,
          _Rework : 0.0 , 
          _TargetProduction : 0.0,
          availableTime: 0.0
      })
    |> map(
      fn: (r) => ({r with
          target_actual_production: r._TargetProduction,
          duration: duration,
          elapsed:elapsed,
          availibilityLoss : r.UNPLANNED,
          right_first_time : math.round(x:  r._Total  /  (r._Total + r._Defect + r._Rework) * 100.0),
          quality_rate : math.round(x: r._Total  / (r._Total+ r._Defect ) * 100.0),
          avg_cycle_time : math.round(x:  (r._Total + r._Defect + r._Rework) / duration * 60.0),
          plannedProductiveTime : r.availableTime - r.PLANNED - r.IDLE,
          _Total: (r._Total + r._Defect + r._Rework -r._Reject)
          }),
      )
    |> map(
      fn: (r) => ({r with
          operatingTime : r.plannedProductiveTime - r.availibilityLoss,
          performance_loss : r.PERFORMANCE + r.MINORSTOPPAGE
          }),
      )
    |> map(
      fn: (r) => ({r with
          netOperatingTime : r._Total / (r.target_actual_production/r.elapsed  ),
          quality_loss : r.QUALITY + r._Defect +r._Rework
          }),
      )
    |> map(
      fn: (r) => ({r with
          fullyProductiveTime : r.netOperatingTime 
          }),
      )
    |> map(
      fn: (r) => ({r with
          availability : math.round(x: r.operatingTime / r.plannedProductiveTime * 100.0),
          performance : math.round(x: r.netOperatingTime / r.operatingTime * 100.0),
          quality : math.round(x: r.fullyProductiveTime / r.netOperatingTime * 100.0),
          }),
      )
    |> map(
      fn: (r) => ({r with
          oee : math.round(x: r.fullyProductiveTime / r.plannedProductiveTime * 100.0)
          }),
      )
    |> set(key: "resolution", value: resolution)
    |> set(key: "type", value: "summaryOEE")
    |> set(key: "start", value: string(v: startQuery))
    |> set(key: "end", value: string(v: endQuery))
    |> set(key: "shift", value: string(v: shift))  
    |> group(columns: ["entityId","type"])
 
  result3 = union(tables: [
      result,
      result2
      ]
) 
	return result3
}






oeeSummaryTotal = array.map(arr: dateList, fn: (x) => oeeSummary(
        queryStart: x.queryStart,
        queryEnd : x.queryEnd,
        resolution : x.resolution,
        shift : x.shift,
        duration: float(v:x.duration),
        elapsed: float(v: x.elapsed),
        entityId: x.entityId,
))

union(tables: oeeSummaryTotal)`

msg.query = a
msg.dtTreshold = msTreshold


return msg;

name: set query
func:
const dateList = JSON.stringify(msg.payload)
const msData = global.get("TRESHOLD_DEFAULT.MINORSTOPAGE");
const id = msData.code
const effectId = msData.effectid
const msTreshold = global.get("TRESHOLD_DEFAULT.DOWNTIMES.treshold");
const defaultDt = global.get("TRESHOLD_DEFAULT.DOWNTIMES.code")
const logic = "TR"
////////////////////
// TR : Total-Reject
// GR : Good-Reject
// TG : Total-Good
var a = `
import "date"
import "contrib/tomhollingworth/events"
import "array"
import "math"

msTreshold = ${msTreshold}
effectId = "${effectId}"
reasonId = "${id}"
defaultDt = "${defaultDt}"

dateList= ${dateList}

oeeSummary = (skuId,queryStart,queryEnd,resolution,shift,duration,elapsed,entityId) => {
  startQuery = time(v:queryStart)
  endQuery = time(v:queryEnd)
  eventDurationTimeHelper = if now() > endQuery then endQuery else now()

  
  event =
  from(bucket: "[OEE] Event")
    |> range(start:  startQuery , stop :  eventDurationTimeHelper)
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "oee")
      |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] != "_time")

    |> filter(fn: (r) => if entityId == "-" then true else  r["entityId"] == entityId)
    |> filter(fn: (r) => if skuId == "-" then true else  r["skuId"] == skuId)
    |> pivot(rowKey:["_time"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
    |> sort(columns: ["_time"], desc: false)
    |> events.duration(
            unit: 1s,
            columnName: "duration",
            timeColumn: "_time",
            stopColumn: "_stop",
            stop: eventDurationTimeHelper
        )
    |> map(fn:  (r) => ({ r with 
      // effectId: if r.duration <= msTreshold and r.reasonId == defaultDt then  effectId else  r.effectId  , 
      // reasonId: if r.duration <= msTreshold and r.reasonId == defaultDt then  reasonId else r.reasonId

      effectId: if r.state == "downtime" then if r.duration <= msTreshold then  effectId else r.effectId  else r.effectId , 
      reasonId: if r.state == "downtime" then if r.duration <= msTreshold then  reasonId else r.reasonId  else r.effectId
  }))


	eventList = 
  event
    |> set(key: "resolution", value: resolution)
    |> set(key: "type", value: "event")
    |> drop(columns: ["_start", "_stop"])
    |> group(columns: ["entityId","type"])
    |> sort(columns: ["_time"], desc: true)
    
  eventSummary = 
  eventList
    |> group(columns: ["entityId","reasonId","effectId","_measurement"])
    |> reduce(fn: (r, accumulator) => ({ duration: r.duration + accumulator.duration , count: 1 + accumulator.count}), identity: {duration: 0 , count:0})
    |> drop(columns: ["_start", "_stop"])
    |> set(key: "resolution", value: resolution)
    |> set(key: "type", value: "summaryEvent")
    |> group(columns: ["entityId","type"])
    |> sort(columns: ["duration","count"], desc: true)

  eventCategory = 
  eventList
    |> group(columns: ["entityId","category","_measurement"])
    |> reduce(fn: (r, accumulator) => ({ duration: r.duration + accumulator.duration , count: 1 + accumulator.count}), identity: {duration: 0 , count:0})
    |> drop(columns: ["_start", "_stop"])
    |> set(key: "resolution", value: resolution)
    |> set(key: "type", value: "summaryDowntimeCategory")
    |> group(columns: ["entityId","type"])
    |> sort(columns: ["duration","count"], desc: true)

  AllData =
  from(bucket: "[OEE] Hourly")
    |> range(start:  if skuId == "-" then startQuery else date.truncate(t: startQuery, unit: 1h) , stop : endQuery)
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "pro")
    |> filter(fn: (r) => if entityId == "-" then true else  r["entityId"] == entityId)
    |> filter(fn: (r) => if skuId == "-" then true else  r["skuId"] == skuId)

  Data =
  AllData
    |> group(columns: ["entityId","_time","_field"])
    |> sum()
    |> group(columns: ["entityId"])
    |> sort(columns: ["_time"], desc: false)  


  hourlyData =
  Data
    |> pivot(rowKey:["_time"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
    |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with 
      resolution: resolution , 
      type : "hourlyData" ,
      _Good: (if exists r._Total then r._Total else 0.0) + (if exists r._Reject then r._Reject else 0.0)
      })
      )
    |> group(columns: ["entityId","type"])
    |> drop(columns: ["_start", "_stop"])
    |> sort(columns: ["_time"], desc: false) 

  summaryPRO =
  AllData
    |> group(columns: ["entityId","proId","_field"])
    |> sum()
    |> pivot(rowKey:["proId"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
    |> drop(columns: ["_start", "_stop"])
    |> set(key: "resolution", value: resolution)
    |> set(key: "type", value: "summaryPRO")
    |> group(columns: ["entityId","type"])
  

  dailyDefectData = 
  from(bucket: "[OEE] Defect")
    |> range(start: startQuery, stop: endQuery)
    // |> filter(fn: (r) => r.vinNumber != "")
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "defectrework")
    |> filter(fn: (r) => if entityId == "-" then true else  r["entityId"] == entityId)
    |> filter(fn: (r) => if skuId == "-" then true else  r["skuId"] == skuId)


  defectSummary = 
    dailyDefectData
    |> group(columns: ["entityId","defect_reason","_field"], mode:"by")
    |> sum()
    |> drop(columns: ["_start", "_stop"])
    |> set(key: "resolution", value: resolution)
    |> set(key: "type", value: "summaryDefect")
    |> group(columns: ["entityId","type"])
    |> sort(columns: ["_value"], desc: true)

  // defectStationSummaryCount = 
  //   dailyDefectData
  //   |> group(columns: ["entityId","station","_field"], mode:"by")
  //   |> sum()
    
  // defectStationSummaryUnit = 
  //    dailyDefectData
  //   |> group(columns: ["entityId","station","_field"], mode:"by")
  //   |> distinct(column: "vinNumber")
  //   |> count(column: "_value")
  //   |> toFloat()
  //   |> set(key: "_field", value: "unit")
    
    
  // defectStationSummary=
  //   union(tables: [defectStationSummaryUnit, defectStationSummaryCount])
  //   |> pivot(rowKey:["station"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  //   |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with dpu: r._Rework / r.unit }))
  //   |> set(key: "resolution", value: resolution)
  //   |> set(key: "type", value: "defectStationSummary")
  //   |> group(columns: ["entityId","type"])

  // result2 = union(tables: [defectStationSummary,defectSummary,hourlyData,eventList,eventSummary,eventCategory,summaryPRO])

  result2 = union(tables: [defectSummary,hourlyData,eventList,eventSummary,eventCategory,summaryPRO])
    |> group(columns: ["entityId", "type"], mode:"by")

  eventTotal = 
    event
      |> group(columns: ["entityId"])
      |> reduce(fn: (r, accumulator) => ({ 
            RUNNING :( if r.effectId == "RUNNING" then float(v: r.duration) else 0.0 )+ accumulator.RUNNING,
            PLANNED :( if r.effectId == "PLANNED" then float(v: r.duration) else 0.0 )+ accumulator.PLANNED,
            IDLE :( if r.effectId == "IDLE" then float(v: r.duration) else 0.0 )+ accumulator.IDLE,
            UNPLANNED :( if r.effectId == "UNPLANNED" then float(v: r.duration) else 0.0 )+ accumulator.UNPLANNED,
            PERFORMANCE :( if r.effectId == "PERFORMANCE" then float(v: r.duration) else 0.0 )+ accumulator.PERFORMANCE,
            MINORSTOPPAGE :( if r.effectId == "MINORSTOPPAGE" then float(v: r.duration) else 0.0 )+ accumulator.MINORSTOPPAGE,
            QUALITY :( if r.effectId == "QUALITY" then float(v: r.duration) else 0.0 )+ accumulator.QUALITY,
        }), 
            identity: {
            PERFORMANCE : 0.0,
            PLANNED : 0.0,
            UNPLANNED : 0.0,
            QUALITY : 0.0,
            IDLE : 0.0,
            RUNNING : 0.0,
            MINORSTOPPAGE : 0.0
        })

  Unit =  
    from(bucket: "[OEE] Defect")
      |> range(start: startQuery, stop: endQuery)
      |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "defectrework")
      |> filter(fn: (r) => r.vinNumber != "")
      |> filter(fn: (r) => if entityId == "-" then true else  r["entityId"] == entityId)
      |> filter(fn: (r) => if skuId == "-" then true else  r["skuId"] == skuId)
      |> group(columns: ["entityId","_field"], mode:"by")
      |> distinct(column: "vinNumber")
      |> count(column: "_value")
      |> toFloat()
  Defect = 
  from(bucket: "[OEE] Defect")
    |> range(start: startQuery, stop: endQuery)
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "defectrework")
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r.vinNumber != "")
     |> filter(fn: (r) => if entityId == "-" then true else  r["entityId"] == entityId)
    |> filter(fn: (r) => if skuId == "-" then true else  r["skuId"] == skuId)
    |> group(columns: ["entityId","_field"], mode:"by")
    |> sum(column: "_value")
    |> set(key: "_field", value: "_Defect")



  defectTotal = 
  union(tables: [Defect, Unit])

    |> group(columns: ["entityId"], mode:"by")
    |> reduce(fn: (r, accumulator) => ({ 
        _Rework: (if r._field == "_Rework" then r._value else 0.0 )+ accumulator._Rework,
        _Defect: (if r._field == "_Defect" then r._value else 0.0 )+ accumulator._Defect,
      }), 
      identity: {_Rework: 0.0 , _Defect:0.0})

  productionTotal = 
  AllData
      |> group(columns: ["entityId","_time","_field"])
      |> sum()
      |> group(columns: ["entityId"])
      |> sort(columns: ["_time"], desc: false)    
      |> drop(columns: ["_start", "_stop"])
      |> reduce(fn: (r, accumulator) => ({ 
            _Good : if r._field == "_Total" then accumulator._Good + r._value else if r._field == "_Reject" then accumulator._Good - r._value else accumulator._Good,
            _Reject : if r._field == "_Reject" then accumulator._Reject + r._value else accumulator._Reject,
            _Rework : if r._field == "_Rework" then accumulator._Rework + r._value else accumulator._Rework,
            _Defect : if r._field == "_Defect" then accumulator._Defect + r._value else accumulator._Defect,
            _Total : if r._field == "_Total" then accumulator._Total + r._value else accumulator._Total,
            _TotalLost : if r._field == "_TotalLost" then accumulator._TotalLost + r._value else accumulator._TotalLost
        }), 
            identity: {
            _TotalLost : 0.0,
            _Reject : 0.0,
            _Rework : 0.0,
            _Defect : 0.0,
            _Good : 0.0,
            _Total : 0.0
        })

  result = 
  union(tables: [eventTotal,productionTotal,defectTotal])
    |> reduce(fn: (r, accumulator) => ({ 
          availableTime: float(v:duration),
          PERFORMANCE : if exists r.PERFORMANCE then r.PERFORMANCE else accumulator.PERFORMANCE ,
          PLANNED : if exists r.PLANNED then r.PLANNED else accumulator.PLANNED ,
          UNPLANNED : if exists r.UNPLANNED then r.UNPLANNED else accumulator.UNPLANNED ,
          QUALITY : if exists r.QUALITY then r.QUALITY else accumulator.QUALITY ,
          IDLE : if exists r.IDLE  then r.IDLE else accumulator.IDLE ,
          RUNNING : if exists r.RUNNING  then r.RUNNING else accumulator.RUNNING ,
          MINORSTOPPAGE : if exists r.MINORSTOPPAGE  then r.MINORSTOPPAGE else accumulator.MINORSTOPPAGE ,
          _Good : if exists r._Good  then  r._Good else accumulator._Good,
          _Reject : if exists r._Reject  then  r._Reject else accumulator._Reject,
          _Total : if exists r._Total then r._Total else accumulator._Total,
          _Defect : if exists r._Defect then  r._Defect else accumulator._Defect,
          _Rework :if exists r._Rework then  r._Rework else accumulator._Rework,
          _TargetProduction :if exists r._TotalLost then  math.round(x:r._TotalLost) else math.round(x:accumulator._TargetProduction)
      }), 
          identity: {
          PERFORMANCE : 0.0,
          PLANNED : 0.0,
          UNPLANNED : 0.0,
          QUALITY : 0.0,
          IDLE : 0.0,
          RUNNING : 0.0,
          MINORSTOPPAGE : 0.0,
          _Reject : 0.0,
          _Good : 0.0,
          _Total : 0.0,
          _Defect : 0.0,
          _Rework : 0.0 , 
          _TargetProduction : 0.0,
          availableTime: 0.0
      })
    |> map(
      fn: (r) => ({r with
          elapsed:if elapsed > duration then duration else elapsed,
          availibilityLoss : r.UNPLANNED,
          target_cycle_time : math.round(x:  (r._TargetProduction) / elapsed * 60.0),
          plannedProductiveTime : r.availableTime - r.PLANNED - r.IDLE,
          }),
      )
    |> map(
      fn: (r) => ({r with
          avg_cycle_time : math.round(x: r._Total / elapsed * 60.0),
          operatingTime : r.plannedProductiveTime - r.availibilityLoss,
          right_first_time : if r._Total - r._Reject - r._Rework == 0.0 then 0.0 else math.round(x:  (r._Total - r._Reject - r._Rework)  /  r._Total  * 100.0),
          quality_rate : if r._Total- r._Reject == 0.0 then 0.0 else math.round(x: (r._Total- r._Reject )  / r._Total * 100.0),
          dpu: if r._Defect == 0.0 or r._Total == 0.0 then 0.0 else r._Defect / r._Total,
          per_loss_time : r.elapsed - r.PLANNED - r.UNPLANNED - r.PERFORMANCE - r.MINORSTOPPAGE - (if r._Total == 0.0 or r._TargetProduction == 0.0 then 0.0 else math.round(x:( r._Total / r._TargetProduction * elapsed)))
        }),
    )
    |> map(
      fn: (r) => ({r with
        up_speed : if r.per_loss_time < 0.0 then math.abs(x: r.per_loss_time) else 0.0 ,
        per_loss_time : if r.per_loss_time < 0.0 then 0.0 else r.per_loss_time
        }),
    )
    |> map(
      fn: (r) => ({r with
          performance_loss : r.per_loss_time + r.up_speed + r.PERFORMANCE + r.MINORSTOPPAGE,
          quality_loss : if r.QUALITY + r._Reject +r._Rework == 0.0 then 0.0 else (r.QUALITY + r._Reject +r._Rework) / r.target_cycle_time
          }),
      )
    |> map(
      fn: (r) => ({r with
          netOperatingTime : r.operatingTime - r.performance_loss,
          fullyProductiveTime : r.operatingTime - r.performance_loss
          }),
      )
    |> map(
      fn: (r) => ({r with
          availability : if exists r.operatingTime then  math.round(x: r.operatingTime / r.plannedProductiveTime * 100.0) else 0.0,
          performance : if exists r.netOperatingTime then  math.round(x: r.netOperatingTime / r.operatingTime * 100.0) else 0.0,
          quality : if exists r.fullyProductiveTime then  math.round(x: r.fullyProductiveTime / r.netOperatingTime * 100.0) else 0.0,
          oee : if exists r.fullyProductiveTime then  math.round(x: r.fullyProductiveTime / r.plannedProductiveTime * 100.0) else 0.0,
          }),
      )
    |> set(key: "resolution", value: resolution)
    |> set(key: "type", value: "summaryOEE")
    |> set(key: "start", value: string(v: startQuery))
    |> set(key: "end", value: string(v: endQuery))
    |> set(key: "shift", value: string(v: shift))  
    |> group(columns: ["entityId","type"])
 
  result3 = union(tables: [
      result,
      result2
      ]
) 
	return result3
}
oeeSummaryTotal = array.map(arr: dateList, fn: (x) => oeeSummary(
  queryStart: x.queryStart,
  queryEnd : x.queryEnd,
  resolution : x.resolution,
  shift : x.shift,
  duration: float(v:x.duration),
  elapsed: float(v: x.elapsed),
  entityId: x.entityId,
  skuId: x.skuId
))

union(tables: oeeSummaryTotal)
`

msg.queryData = msg.query
msg.dtTreshold = msTreshold
msg.queryTime = moment()
msg.query = a

return msg;

Yes, there are some parts of the query that can be simplified to enhance performance:

1. Filter Optimization: In multiple places, there are filter conditions that check if a particular field is equal to a specific value. Instead of using conditional filters, you can use the `==` operator directly in the `filter` function.

2. Removing Unnecessary Operations: There are some commented out parts of the query that are not being used. Removing these unused operations can help improve query performance.

3. Unnecessary Sorting: In the `eventList` and `hourlyData` sections, you are sorting the data by `_time` in ascending order. If the data is already sorted in the desired order or if the order doesn't matter, you can remove the sorting operation to save computation time.

4. Optimization in Grouping: In some cases, you are using `group` functions without specifying the `mode`. The default `mode` is `"by"` which is not required here. You can remove the `mode: "by"` parameter to improve performance.

5. Redundant Mapping: In the final part of the query, you are using multiple `map` functions one after the other. You can combine these `map` operations into a single `map` function to avoid unnecessary iterations over the data.

6. Conditional Mappings: In some `map` functions, you have conditions like `if exists r.operatingTime then ... else 0.0`. Instead of using `if exists`, you can use the `coalesce()` function to get the value or a default value if it's missing.

7. Limiting Data Range: In the `from` functions, try to specify the exact data range you need instead of querying all data within the specified time range. This can reduce the amount of data to process and improve query performance.

8. Using `merge()` Function: In the part where you are creating `event`, consider using the `merge()` function instead of multiple separate `map` functions. The `merge()` function combines multiple objects into one, which can help improve readability and potentially performance.

These optimizations might vary depending on the actual data and use case, so it's always recommended to test the performance impact of each change on real data to measure the actual improvement. Additionally, be sure to check the execution plan to see how the Flux engine processes the query and identify any potential bottlenecks.

func:
const dateList = JSON.stringify(msg.payload)
const msData = global.get("MINORSTOP_DEFAULT");
const id = msData.id
const effectId = msData.effectid
const msTreshold = global.get("DOWNTIME_DEFAULT.treshold");

var a = `
import "date"
import "contrib/tomhollingworth/events"
import "array"
import "math"

msTreshold = ${msTreshold}
effectId = "${id}"
reasonId = "${effectId}"

dateList= ${dateList}


oeeSummary = (queryStart,queryEnd,resolution,shift,duration,elapsed,entityId) => {
  startQuery = time(v:queryStart)
  endQuery = time(v:queryEnd)

  
  event =
  from(bucket: "[OEE] Event")
    |> range(start:  startQuery , stop : now())
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "oee")
    |> filter(fn: (r) => if entityId == "-" then true else  r["entityId"] == entityId)
    |> pivot(rowKey:["_time"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
    |> events.duration(
            unit: 1s,
            columnName: "duration",
            timeColumn: "_time",
            stopColumn: "_stop",
            stop: now()
        )
    |> map(fn:  (r) => ({ r with 
      effectId: if r.duration < msTreshold and r.state == "start" then  effectId else  r.effectId  , 
      reasonId: if r.duration < msTreshold and r.state == "start" then  reasonId else r.reasonId
  }))


	eventList = 
  event
    |> set(key: "resolution", value: resolution)
    |> set(key: "type", value: "event")
    |> drop(columns: ["_start", "_stop"])
    |> group(columns: ["entityId","type"])
    
  eventSummary = 
  eventList
    |> group(columns: ["entityId","reasonId","_measurement"])
    |> reduce(fn: (r, accumulator) => ({ duration: r.duration + accumulator.duration , count: 1 + accumulator.count}), identity: {duration: 0 , count:0})
    |> drop(columns: ["_start", "_stop"])
    |> set(key: "resolution", value: resolution)
    |> set(key: "type", value: "summaryEvent")
    |> group(columns: ["entityId","type"])


  AllData =
  from(bucket: "[OEE] Hourly")
    |> range(start:  startQuery , stop : endQuery)
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "oee")
    |> filter(fn: (r) => if entityId == "-" then true else  r["entityId"] == entityId)


  Data =
  AllData
    |> group(columns: ["entityId","_time","_field"])
    |> sum()
    |> group(columns: ["entityId"])
    |> sort(columns: ["_time"], desc: false)  


  hourlyData =
  Data
    |> pivot(rowKey:["_time"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
    |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with resolution: resolution , type : "hourlyData" , _Total: (if exists r._Good then r._Good else 0.0) + (if exists r._Reject then r._Reject else 0.0)}))
    |> group(columns: ["entityId","type"])
    |> drop(columns: ["_start", "_stop"])
    |> sort(columns: ["_time"], desc: false) 


  dailyDefectData = 
  from(bucket: "[OEE] Realtime")
    |> range(start: startQuery, stop: endQuery)
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "defectrework")
    |> filter(fn: (r) => if entityId == "-" then true else  r["entityId"] == entityId)


  defectSummary = 
    dailyDefectData
    |> group(columns: ["entityId","defect_reason","_field"], mode:"by")
    |> sum()
    |> drop(columns: ["_start", "_stop"])
    |> set(key: "resolution", value: resolution)
    |> set(key: "type", value: "summaryDefect")
    |> group(columns: ["entityId","type"])

  result2 = union(tables: [defectSummary,hourlyData,eventList,eventSummary])
    |> group(columns: ["entityId", "type"], mode:"by")

  eventTotal = 
    from(bucket: "[OEE] Event")
      |> range(start:  startQuery , stop : now())
      |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "oee")
      |> filter(fn: (r) => if entityId == "-" then true else  r["entityId"] == entityId)
      |> pivot(rowKey:["_time"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
      |> events.duration(
              unit: 1s,
              columnName: "duration",
              timeColumn: "_time",
              stopColumn: "_stop",
              stop: now()
          )
      |> map(fn:  (r) => ({ r with 
        effectId: if r.duration < msTreshold and r.state == "start" then  effectId else  r.effectId  , 
        reasonId: if r.duration < msTreshold and r.state == "start" then  reasonId else r.reasonId
        }))
      |> group(columns: ["entityId"])
      |> reduce(fn: (r, accumulator) => ({ 
            RUNNING :( if r.effectId == "RUNNING" then float(v: r.duration) else 0.0 )+ accumulator.RUNNING,
            PLANNED :( if r.effectId == "2" then float(v: r.duration) else 0.0 )+ accumulator.PLANNED,
            IDLE :( if r.effectId == "5" then float(v: r.duration) else 0.0 )+ accumulator.IDLE,
            UNPLANNED :( if r.effectId == "3" then float(v: r.duration) else 0.0 )+ accumulator.UNPLANNED,
            PERFORMANCE :( if r.effectId == "1" then float(v: r.duration) else 0.0 )+ accumulator.PERFORMANCE,
            MINORSTOPPAGE :( if r.effectId == "7" then float(v: r.duration) else 0.0 )+ accumulator.MINORSTOPPAGE,
            QUALITY :( if r.effectId == "4" then float(v: r.duration) else 0.0 )+ accumulator.QUALITY,
        }), 
            identity: {
            PERFORMANCE : 0.0,
            PLANNED : 0.0,
            UNPLANNED : 0.0,
            QUALITY : 0.0,
            IDLE : 0.0,
            RUNNING : 0.0,
            MINORSTOPPAGE : 0.0
        })

  defectTotal = 
  from(bucket: "[OEE] Realtime")
    |> range(start: startQuery, stop: endQuery)
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "defectrework")
    |> filter(fn: (r) => if entityId == "-" then true else  r["entityId"] == entityId)
    |> group(columns: ["entityId","_field"], mode:"by")
    |> sum(column: "_value")
    |> group(columns: ["entityId"], mode:"by")
    |> reduce(fn: (r, accumulator) => ({ 
        _Rework: (if r._field == "_Rework" then r._value else 0.0 )+ accumulator._Rework,
        _Defect: (if r._field == "_Reject" then r._value else 0.0 )+ accumulator._Defect,
      }), 
      identity: {_Rework: 0.0 , _Defect:0.0})

  productionTotal = 
  from(bucket: "[OEE] Hourly")
      |> range(start:  startQuery , stop : endQuery)
      |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "oee")
      |> filter(fn: (r) => if entityId == "-" then true else  r["entityId"] == entityId)
      |> group(columns: ["entityId","_time","_field"])
      |> sum()
      |> group(columns: ["entityId"])
      |> sort(columns: ["_time"], desc: false)    
      |> drop(columns: ["_start", "_stop"])
      |> reduce(fn: (r, accumulator) => ({ 
            _Good : if r._field == "_Good" then accumulator._Good + r._value else accumulator._Good,
            _Reject : if r._field == "_Reject" then accumulator._Reject + r._value else accumulator._Reject,
            _Total : if r._field == "_Good" or  r._field == "_Reject" then accumulator._Total + r._value else  accumulator._Total,
            _TotalLost : if r._field == "_TotalLost" then accumulator._TotalLost + r._value else accumulator._TotalLost
        }), 
            identity: {
            _TotalLost : 0.0,
            _Reject : 0.0,
            _Good : 0.0,
            _Total : 0.0
        })

  result = 
  union(tables: [eventTotal,productionTotal,defectTotal])
    |> reduce(fn: (r, accumulator) => ({ 
          availableTime: float(v:duration),
          PERFORMANCE : if exists r.PERFORMANCE then r.PERFORMANCE else accumulator.PERFORMANCE ,
          PLANNED : if exists r.PLANNED then r.PLANNED else accumulator.PLANNED ,
          UNPLANNED : if exists r.UNPLANNED then r.UNPLANNED else accumulator.UNPLANNED ,
          QUALITY : if exists r.QUALITY then r.QUALITY else accumulator.QUALITY ,
          IDLE : if exists r.IDLE  then r.IDLE else accumulator.IDLE ,
          RUNNING : if exists r.RUNNING  then r.RUNNING else accumulator.RUNNING ,
          MINORSTOPPAGE : if exists r.MINORSTOPPAGE  then r.MINORSTOPPAGE else accumulator.MINORSTOPPAGE ,
          _Good : if exists r._Good  then  r._Good else accumulator._Good,
          _Reject : if exists r._Reject  then  r._Reject else accumulator._Reject,
          _Total : if exists r._Total then r._Total else accumulator._Total,
          _Defect : if exists r._Defect then  r._Defect else accumulator._Defect,
          _Rework :if exists r._Rework then  r._Rework else accumulator._Rework,
          _TargetProduction :if exists r._TotalLost then  r._TotalLost else accumulator._TargetProduction
      }), 
          identity: {
          PERFORMANCE : 0.0,
          PLANNED : 0.0,
          UNPLANNED : 0.0,
          QUALITY : 0.0,
          IDLE : 0.0,
          RUNNING : 0.0,
          MINORSTOPPAGE : 0.0,
          _Reject : 0.0,
          _Good : 0.0,
          _Total : 0.0,
          _Defect : 0.0,
          _Rework : 0.0 , 
          _TargetProduction : 0.0,
          availableTime: 0.0
      })
    |> map(
      fn: (r) => ({r with
          target_actual_production: r._TargetProduction,
          duration: r.duration,
          elapsed:elapsed,
          availibilityLoss : r.UNPLANNED,
          right_first_time : math.round(x:  r._Total  /  (r._Total + r._Defect + r._Rework) * 100.0),
          quality_rate : math.round(x: r._Total  / (r._Total+ r._Defect ) * 100.0),
          target_cycle_time : math.round(x:  (r._TargetProduction) / elapsed * 60.0),
          avg_cycle_time : math.round(x:  (r._Total + r._Defect + r._Rework) / elapsed * 60.0),
          plannedProductiveTime : r.availableTime - r.PLANNED - r.IDLE,
          _Total: (r._Total + r._Defect + r._Rework -r._Reject),
          per_loss_time : r._Total / (r._TargetProduction / elapsed  )
          })
      )
    |> map(
      fn: (r) => ({r with
          operatingTime : r.plannedProductiveTime - r.availibilityLoss,
          performance_loss : math.abs(x: r.PERFORMANCE + r.MINORSTOPPAGE + r.plannedProductiveTime - r.availibilityLoss - r.per_loss_time)
          }),
      )
    |> map(
      fn: (r) => ({r with
          netOperatingTime : r.operatingTime - r.performance_loss,
          quality_loss : r.QUALITY + r._Defect +r._Rework
          }),
      )
    |> map(
      fn: (r) => ({r with
          fullyProductiveTime : r.netOperatingTime 
          }),
      )
    |> map(
      fn: (r) => ({r with
          availability : math.round(x: r.operatingTime / r.plannedProductiveTime * 100.0),
          performance : math.round(x: r.netOperatingTime / r.operatingTime * 100.0),
          quality : math.round(x: r.fullyProductiveTime / r.netOperatingTime * 100.0),
          }),
      )
    |> map(
      fn: (r) => ({r with
          oee : math.round(x: r.fullyProductiveTime / r.plannedProductiveTime * 100.0)
          }),
      )
    |> set(key: "resolution", value: resolution)
    |> set(key: "type", value: "summaryOEE")
    |> set(key: "start", value: string(v: startQuery))
    |> set(key: "end", value: string(v: endQuery))
    |> set(key: "shift", value: string(v: shift))  
    |> group(columns: ["entityId","type"])
 
  result3 = union(tables: [
      result,
      result2
      ]
) 
	return result3
}






oeeSummaryTotal = array.map(arr: dateList, fn: (x) => oeeSummary(
        queryStart: x.queryStart,
        queryEnd : x.queryEnd,
        resolution : x.resolution,
        shift : x.shift,
        duration: float(v:x.duration),
        elapsed: float(v: x.elapsed),
        entityId: x.entityId,
))

union(tables: oeeSummaryTotal)`

msg.query = a
msg.dtTreshold = msTreshold


return msg;

checking WS
info:
Penjelasan Kode
Fungsi ini memproses pesan yang diterima, mengupdate variabel global, dan mengirim pesan berdasarkan konfigurasi yang ada.

Ambil Payload dan UID:

payload: Ambil data dari msg.payload.data.
uid: Ambil UID dari msg.payload.uid.
Tentukan Topik:

Cek jika konfigurasi JSON untuk UID dalam global.get(WS.${uid}.json_configuration.collection_to_trigger) ada. Jika ada, gunakan konfigurasi tersebut sebagai topic. Jika tidak, gunakan uid sebagai topic.
Update Variabel Global:

Simpan waktu trigger terakhir dalam global.set(SYS.WS.MONIT.${uid}.last_trigger, new Date()).
Simpan event dari pesan dalam global.set(SYS.WS.MONIT.${uid}.event, msg.payload.event).
Ambil Konfigurasi dan Post-Processing:

Ambil konfigurasi WebSocket untuk topic dari global.get(WS.${topic}).
Ambil data post-processing terkait dengan topic dari global.get(POST_FUNCTION.POST_FUNCTION.${topic}).
Update Status Node:

Set status node menjadi kuning (yellow) dengan teks yang menunjukkan uid dan topic, menggunakan node.status({ fill: "yellow", shape: "ring", text: ${uid} : ${topic} }).
Kirim Pesan:

Jika ada konfigurasi post-processing dan konfigurasi JSON untuk wsConfig:
Set status node menjadi hijau (green) dengan teks yang menunjukkan uid dan topic, menggunakan node.status({ fill: "green", shape: "ring", text: ${uid} : ${topic} }).
Simpan topic dalam global.set(SYS.WS.MONIT.${uid}.collection_to_trigger, topic).
Kirim pesan dengan topik dan UID menggunakan node.send([{ topic, uid}, null]).

name: send ws
info:
**Penjelasan Kode**
Fungsi ini memproses data dari pesan yang diterima dan mengirimkan data secara bertahap dengan penundaan.

Update Variabel Global:
SYS.WS.GENERAL.WS_collection: Set variabel global dengan panjang data dari msg.payload.data.length. Ini menyimpan jumlah item dalam koleksi.
SYS.WS.GENERAL.init_time: Set variabel global dengan waktu saat ini menggunakan new Date(). Ini mencatat waktu inisialisasi.
Proses Data dan Kirim Pesan:

Iterasi melalui setiap item dalam msg.payload.data:
Buat Data untuk Dikirim:
items: Ambil koleksi dari item saat ini.
datacore: Tetapkan nilai "MAIN-DATACORE".
method: Tetapkan nilai "GET".
params: Set parameter dengan field "id" dan limit 1.
query_params: Ambil parameter dari item.json_configuration?.params jika tersedia, atau objek kosong jika tidak ada.
json_configuration: Ambil konfigurasi JSON dari item.json_configuration.
Kirim Pesan dengan Penundaan:
Gunakan setTimeout untuk menunda pengiriman data.
Pengiriman dilakukan dengan penundaan yang meningkat, yaitu 100 milidetik per iterasi (i * 100).

name: validator
info:
Penjelasan Kode
Fungsi ini memproses objek pesan (msg) dan melakukan beberapa tindakan berdasarkan adanya kesalahan atau tidak (msg.error).

Cek Kesalahan:

if (!msg.error): Periksa apakah tidak ada kesalahan dalam objek pesan (msg).
Ambil Payload dan Konfigurasi:

let payload = msg.payload.data || []: Ambil data dari msg.payload.data, jika tidak ada, set payload menjadi array kosong.
let postProcessing = global.get(POST_FUNCTION.POST_FUNCTION.${msg.items}): Ambil fungsi pemrosesan pasca dari variabel global berdasarkan msg.items.
Update Status Monitoring:

global.set(SYS.WS.MONIT.${msg.uid}.last_query, new Date()): Set waktu query terakhir untuk msg.uid.
global.set(SYS.WS.MONIT.${msg.uid}.statusCode, msg.statusCode): Set kode status HTTP untuk msg.uid.
global.set(SYS.WS.MONIT.${msg.uid}.statusText, msg.statusText): Set teks status HTTP untuk msg.uid.
Proses Payload:

if (postProcessing): Jika fungsi pemrosesan pasca ada:
Coba Proses:
global.set(SYS.WS.MONIT.${msg.uid}.statusProcessing, true): Set status pemrosesan menjadi true.
global.set(SYS.MQTT.GENERAL.status, msg.uid): Set status MQTT menjadi msg.uid.
Kirim Hasil:
return [{ iud: msg.items, payload, result: postProcessing(payload), postProcessing }, null]: Kembalikan array dengan objek yang berisi iud, payload, hasil pemrosesan, dan fungsi pemrosesan pasca.
Tangani Kesalahan:
catch (error): Tangani kesalahan jika terjadi selama pemrosesan:
global.set(SYS.MQTT.GENERAL.status, ""): Reset status MQTT.
global.set(SYS.WS.MONIT.${msg.uid}.statusProcessing, false): Set status pemrosesan menjadi false.
Kirim Kesalahan:
return [null, { iud: msg.items, error, payload: msg.payload, postProcessing }]: Kembalikan array dengan objek yang berisi iud, kesalahan, payload asli, dan fungsi pemrosesan pasca.
Jika Tidak Ada Fungsi Pemrosesan:
return [null, { payload }]: Kembalikan array dengan payload jika tidak ada fungsi pemrosesan pasca.
Jika Ada Kesalahan:

Fungsi ini tidak mengembalikan apa-apa jika ada kesalahan (msg.error), hanya jika tidak ada kesalahan.

name: INIT Query Prep
info:
**Penjelasan Kode**
Fungsi ini memproses objek pesan (msg) dengan mengatur berbagai properti berdasarkan konfigurasi yang diambil dari variabel global.

Ambil Konfigurasi WebSocket:

wsConfig: Ambil konfigurasi WebSocket dari variabel global dengan kunci yang sesuai dengan msg.topic.
Atur Properti Pesan:

msg.items: Set properti items pada msg dengan nilai dari wsConfig.items.
msg.params: Jika wsConfig.json_configuration dan wsConfig.json_configuration.params ada, set properti params pada msg dengan nilai dari wsConfig.json_configuration.params.
msg.method: Tetapkan nilai metode ke "GET".
msg.datacore: Tetapkan nilai datacore ke "MAIN-DATACORE".
msg.toFront: Set nilai properti toFront ke true, yang mungkin digunakan untuk menunjukkan bahwa pesan harus diproses di depan atau dengan prioritas lebih tinggi.
Kembalikan Pesan:

return msg: Kembalikan objek msg yang telah diperbarui untuk diproses lebih lanjut.

name: Web Socket Handler
info:
**onStart**
Fungsi ini mengambil token dari variabel lingkungan DATACORE dan mengirimkan pesan autentikasi setelah penundaan selama 1 detik.
Langkah 1: Ambil token dari variabel lingkungan DATACORE.
Langkah 2: Siapkan objek data yang berisi tipe pesan "auth" dan token akses.
Langkah 3: Gunakan setTimeout untuk menunda pengiriman pesan selama 1 detik.
Langkah 4: Kirim objek data sebagai pesan dan akhir aliran dengan return null.

**onMessage**
Fungsi ini memeriksa apakah ada metode yang ada dalam pesan masuk dan memprosesnya sesuai dengan tipe pesan tersebut.
Jika pesan memiliki metode (msg.method):
Langkah 1: Buat objek permintaan websocket dengan tipe "subscribe", koleksi, kueri, dan uid yang sesuai.
Langkah 2: Simpan sumber tautan (link source) dalam konteks global di bawah koleksi WS.
Langkah 3: Perbarui status langganan dan waktu terakhir langganan dalam konteks global.
Langkah 4: Kirim permintaan websocket dalam output.
Jika pesan tidak memiliki metode (else):
Langkah 1: Parse payload pesan yang masuk menjadi objek JSON.
Langkah 2: Perbarui waktu dalam konteks global.
Langkah 3: Proses berbagai tipe pesan berdasarkan tipe pesan:
Tipe "ping": Respon dengan pesan "pong" dan perbarui status node.
Tipe "auth": Periksa status autentikasi dan perbarui status node jika statusnya "ok". Kirim sinyal pemicu untuk menandakan bahwa autentikasi berhasil.
Tipe "subscription": Tangani peristiwa langganan dengan memperbarui status node sesuai dengan event "init" dan kirim pesan serta _linkSource yang diambil dari konteks global.
Tipe pesan lainnya: Tidak ada data pesan yang dikirim.

name: Global UTIL
info:
1. UTIL.sumArrayObject: Fungsi ini menghitung jumlah dari sebuah properti tertentu dalam sebuah array objek. Pertama, fungsi memeriksa apakah input adalah sebuah array. Jika ya, fungsi ini menggunakan metode reduce untuk menjumlahkan nilai dari properti yang ditentukan pada semua objek dalam array. Hasilnya dikembalikan dalam bentuk objek dengan jumlah yang disimpan di field payload.
 2. UTIL.maxArrayObject: Fungsi ini mencari nilai maksimum dari sebuah properti tertentu dalam array objek. Pertama, fungsi memeriksa apakah input adalah sebuah array. Kemudian, fungsi ini mengurutkan array dalam urutan menurun berdasarkan properti yang ditentukan dan mengembalikan nilai dari properti tersebut dari objek pertama dalam array yang sudah diurutkan, yang akan menjadi nilai maksimum.
 3. UTIL.minArrayObject: Mirip dengan fungsi maxArrayObject, fungsi ini mencari nilai minimum dari sebuah properti tertentu dalam array objek. Fungsi ini mengurutkan array dalam urutan menaik berdasarkan properti tersebut dan mengembalikan nilai dari properti tersebut dari objek pertama dalam array yang sudah diurutkan, yang akan menjadi nilai minimum.
 4. UTIL.groupBy: Fungsi ini mengelompokkan array objek berdasarkan kunci tertentu. Fungsi ini menggunakan metode reduce untuk membuat objek hasil di mana setiap kunci mewakili nilai unik dari kunci yang ditentukan dalam array asli. Objek dengan nilai kunci yang sama dikelompokkan dalam array.
 5. UTIL.replaceQueryParam: Fungsi ini menggantikan placeholder dalam string query dengan nilai dari payload. Fungsi ini melakukan iterasi pada parameter yang akan diganti, memeriksa apakah parameter tersebut diperlukan dan ada dalam payload, serta memformat nilai-nilai sesuai kebutuhan (misalnya, format tanggal-waktu). Placeholder dalam string query kemudian digantikan dengan nilai yang sesuai dari payload.
 6. UTIL.dbQuery: Fungsi ini menjalankan query ke database berdasarkan jenis klien database yang ditentukan. Fungsi ini memvalidasi parameter koneksi, membuat koneksi ke database yang sesuai menggunakan jenis klien yang diberikan (MySQL, PostgreSQL, MSSQL, MongoDB, Oracle), menjalankan query, dan kemudian mengembalikan hasilnya. Penanganan kesalahan disertakan untuk mengelola masalah selama eksekusi query dan penutupan koneksi.
 7. UTIL.validateConnectionAndQuery: Fungsi ini memvalidasi parameter koneksi dan string query. Fungsi ini memeriksa apakah parameter koneksi yang diperlukan (host, port, username, password, database) telah diberikan dan valid. Terdapat juga kode yang dikomentari untuk memvalidasi string query.
 8. UTIL.DAQ.typeConversion: Fungsi ini menangani berbagai konversi tipe data. Fungsi ini melakukan konversi seperti integer ke float, string ke buffer, buffer ke string, dan lainnya. Setiap kasus konversi ditangani secara terpisah, dan jika konversi gagal, pesan kesalahan dicatat. Fungsi ini mengembalikan nilai yang telah dikonversi atau null jika konversi gagal.

name: Init WS
info:
**Penjelasan:**
 1. mt_workcenter: Memproses data workcenter untuk membuat struktur result, proList, shiftPlanning, dan processEngineering, serta menyimpan data ke dalam global context.
 2. mt_defect: Memproses data defect berdasarkan code dan menyimpannya dalam global context.
 3. mt_downtime_threshold: Mengolah data downtime threshold dengan menyimpan informasi threshold dalam format yang sesuai.
 4. mt_downtime, mt_downtime_category, mt_downtime_effect: Mengolah data downtime, kategori, dan efek berdasarkan code.
 5. mt_shift: Mengatur data shift untuk shift reguler dan longshift serta menentukan shift pertama untuk setiap kategori.
 6. mt_query_graphic: Mengolah data query graphic berdasarkan name.
 7. mt_stock_keeping_unit: Menyimpan data SKU produk.
 8. mt_etl_source, mt_etl_connection: Mengolah data ETL source dan connection, menyimpannya dalam global context.
 9. mt_ot_protocol, mt_metric, mt_pro_process_engineering, mt_ot_conversion, mt_ot_aggregation_method, mt_ot_resolution: Mengolah berbagai jenis data untuk disimpan di dalam global context.

name: HTTP REQUEST
info:
**Penjelasan Kode**
Kode ini digunakan untuk menangani permintaan HTTP dengan metode GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, dan PATCH, serta mengelola kesalahan yang terjadi selama proses tersebut.

Konstanta dan Fungsi Utama
Konstanta timeOutSettings:

const timeOutSettings = 60000;
Menetapkan waktu tunggu default untuk permintaan HTTP dalam milidetik (60 detik).
Fungsi handleHttpRequest:

Tujuan: Menangani permintaan HTTP dengan validasi dan pengelolaan kesalahan.
Parameter:
input: Objek yang berisi parameter untuk permintaan HTTP (misalnya URL, metode, payload).
Langkah-langkah:
Validasi:
Periksa apakah input.url dan input.method ada. Jika tidak, lemparkan kesalahan.
Menangani Metode:
Berdasarkan metode HTTP (GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, PATCH), panggil fungsi makeRequest.
Jika metode tidak didukung, lemparkan kesalahan.
Penanganan Kesalahan:
Jika terjadi kesalahan, buat objek kesalahan dengan detail seperti status kode, pesan, dan kode kesalahan.
Gabungkan data kesalahan dengan data input yang ada.
Fungsi makeRequest:

Tujuan: Membuat permintaan HTTP berdasarkan konfigurasi.
Parameter:
input: Objek konfigurasi untuk permintaan HTTP.
Langkah-langkah:
Konfigurasi:
Buat objek konfigurasi untuk permintaan HTTP berdasarkan input.
Kirim Permintaan:
Kirim permintaan menggunakan axios dengan konfigurasi yang ditentukan.
Perbarui Input:
Jika berhasil, perbarui objek input dengan data dari respons.
Jika gagal, lemparkan kesalahan.
Fungsi updateInput:

Tujuan: Memperbarui objek input dengan data dari respons HTTP.
Parameter:
input: Objek konfigurasi awal untuk permintaan HTTP.
response: Respons dari permintaan HTTP.
Langkah-langkah:
Perbarui Data:
Gabungkan data respons (payload, statusCode, statusText, headers, dll.) dengan data input.
Kembalikan Data:
Kembalikan objek input yang diperbarui dengan data respons.
Penggunaan Contoh:

return await handleHttpRequest(msg);
Memanggil fungsi handleHttpRequest dengan objek msg dan menunggu hasilnya.
Rangkuman
Kode ini dirancang untuk menangani permintaan HTTP dengan berbagai metode. Ia memastikan bahwa URL dan metode permintaan valid, menangani kesalahan, dan memperbarui data input dengan respons dari permintaan. Fungsi makeRequest melakukan permintaan HTTP aktual, dan fungsi updateInput memperbarui objek input dengan data dari respons.

name: REST Global Keys
INIT MQTT PUBLISH
info:
**Penjelasan Kode**
Fungsi ini memeriksa daftar topik yang harus dipublikasikan dan mengirimkan data terkait dengan topik-topik tersebut jika perlu.

Ambil Data Topik:
Ambil daftar topik yang tersedia dari variabel global POST_FUNCTION.LIST dan simpan dalam variabel dataToPublish.
Jika Ada Data untuk Dipublikasikan:
Langkah 1: Inisialisasi objek listInit untuk menyimpan informasi tentang topik yang telah diproses.
Langkah 2: Iterasi melalui setiap topik (topic1) dalam dataToPublish:
Langkah 2.1: Ambil waktu pembaruan terakhir (last_update) untuk topik tersebut dari variabel global.
Langkah 2.2: Hitung selisih waktu antara waktu sekarang dan last_update dalam detik menggunakan moment().diff().
Langkah 2.3: Tentukan apakah waktu selisih (diff) kurang dari atau sama dengan 1 detik (trigger).
Langkah 2.4: Jika trigger bernilai true (yaitu pembaruan terakhir terjadi dalam 1 detik terakhir):
Ambil data terkait untuk topik tersebut dari variabel global.
Inisialisasi listInit[topic1] sebagai array kosong.
Iterasi melalui setiap sub-topik (topic2) dalam data:
Buat nama topik baru dengan format INIT/${topic1}/${topic2}.
Ambil payload untuk sub-topik tersebut.
Tambahkan topic2 ke dalam array listInit[topic1].
Kirim pesan dengan topik dan payload menggunakan node.send().
Kirim pesan tambahan yang berisi waktu saat ini (now), waktu pembaruan terakhir (last_update), selisih waktu (diff), status trigger (trigger), dan daftar pembaruan topik (list_update).

MJML Parsing
info:
## Howto

1. Create dynamic content
2. Use the template node to mix your dynamic content and MJML syntax
3. Let the MJML parse node convert the template to HTML
4. Send yoour HTMl with the email node

name: Set Payload
Order Confirmation
template:
<mjml>
            <mj-head>
                <mj-title>Order Confirmation and Delivery Number Submission</mj-title>
                <mj-font name="Roboto" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Roboto:wght@400;700&display=swap" />
                <mj-attributes>
                <mj-all font-family="Roboto, Arial, sans-serif" />
                <mj-text font-size="14px" color="#333333" line-height="1.5" />
                <mj-section padding="0px" />
                </mj-attributes>
                <mj-style>
                .barcode-text {
                    font-family: 'Libre Barcode 128', monospace;
                    font-size: 48px;
                    letter-spacing: 0;
                }
                </mj-style>
            </mj-head>

            <mj-body>

                <mj-section>
                <mj-column>
                    <mj-text padding="25px 50px 0 50px" font-weight="600" align="center" font-size="18px" color="#4B465C">
                    MACHINE VISION
                    </mj-text>
                </mj-column>
                </mj-section>

                <mj-section>
                <mj-column>
                    <mj-text padding="25px 50px 25px 50px" font-weight="600" align="center" font-size="22px">
                    Order Confirmation and Delivery Number Submission
                    </mj-text>
                </mj-column>
                </mj-section>

                <!-- HEADER BAR -->
                <mj-section border="1px solid #e0e0e0">
                <mj-column>
                    <mj-text padding="12px" font-weight="600">
                    PT. Sumber Mas Autorindo
                    </mj-text>
                </mj-column>
                <mj-column>
                    <mj-text align="right" padding="12px">
                    Spareparts
                    </mj-text>
                </mj-column>
                </mj-section>

                <!-- DI NUMBER + BARCODE + QTY -->
                <mj-section border-left="1px solid #e0e0e0" border-right="1px solid #e0e0e0" border-bottom="1px solid #e0e0e0">
                <mj-column border-right="1px solid #e0e0e0">
                    <mj-text font-size="12px" padding="12px">DI Number</mj-text>
                    <mj-text padding="12px" font-weight="600" font-size="16px">
                    
                    </mj-text>
                </mj-column>

                <mj-column>
                    <mj-image
                    src=""
                    />
                </mj-column>

                <mj-column border-left="1px solid #e0e0e0" border-right="1px solid #e0e0e0">
                    <mj-text font-size="12px" padding="12px">Order Quantity</mj-text>
                    <mj-text padding="12px" font-weight="600" font-size="16px">
                    ${arrivalOrderItem.order_qty}
                    </mj-text>
                </mj-column>

                <mj-column>
                    <mj-text font-size="12px" padding="12px">Delivered Quantity</mj-text>
                    <mj-text padding="12px" font-weight="600" font-size="16px">
                    ${arrivalOrderItem.delivery_qty}
                    </mj-text>
                </mj-column>
                </mj-section>

                <!-- VENDOR / DELIVERY DATE / PERIOD / AREA -->
                <mj-section border-left="1px solid #e0e0e0" border-right="1px solid #e0e0e0" border-bottom="1px solid #e0e0e0">

                <mj-column border-right="1px solid #e0e0e0" width="37%">
                    <mj-text font-size="12px" padding="12px">Vendor Name</mj-text>
                    <mj-text padding="12px" font-weight="600" font-size="16px">
                    {{payload.data.purchase_order_id.supplier_id.name}}
                    </mj-text>
                </mj-column>

                <mj-column border-right="1px solid #e0e0e0" width="20%">
                    <mj-text font-size="12px" padding="12px">Delivery Date</mj-text>
                    <mj-text padding="12px" font-weight="600" font-size="16px">
                    {{payload.data.delivery_date}}
                    </mj-text>
                </mj-column>

                <mj-column border-right="1px solid #e0e0e0" width="20%">
                    <mj-text font-size="12px" padding="12px">Delivery Period</mj-text>
                    <mj-text padding="12px" font-weight="600" font-size="16px">
                    
                    </mj-text>
                </mj-column>

                <mj-column width="23%">
                    <mj-text font-size="12px" padding="12px">Recieving Area</mj-text>
                    <mj-text padding="12px" font-weight="600" font-size="16px">
                    {{payload.data.purchase_order_id.warehouse_id.name}}
                    </mj-text>
                </mj-column>

                </mj-section>

                <!-- PART NAME / CLASSIFICATION / SHELF -->
                {{#payload.data.arrival_order_items}}
                <mj-section border-left="1px solid #e0e0e0" border-right="1px solid #e0e0e0" border-bottom="1px solid #e0e0e0">
                <mj-column border-right="1px solid #e0e0e0" width="40%">
                    <mj-text font-size="12px" padding="12px">Parts Name</mj-text>
                    <mj-text padding="12px" font-weight="600" font-size="16px">
                    {{#material_id}}{{name}}{{/material_id}}{{^material_id}}-{{/material_id}}
                    </mj-text>
                </mj-column>

                <mj-column border-right="1px solid #e0e0e0" width="20%">
                    <mj-text font-size="12px" padding="12px">Classification</mj-text>
                    <mj-text padding="12px" font-weight="600" font-size="16px">
                    {{#material_id}}{{#group_id}}{{name}}{{/group_id}}{{/material_id}}{{^material_id}}-{{/material_id}}
                    </mj-text>
                </mj-column>

                <mj-column width="40%">
                    <mj-text font-size="12px" padding="12px">Warehouse Shelf No.</mj-text>
                    <mj-text padding="12px" font-weight="600" font-size="16px">
                    {{#material_id}}{{rack}}{{/material_id}}{{^material_id}}Warehouse Shelf - TBA{{/material_id}}
                    </mj-text>
                </mj-column>
                </mj-section>
                {{/payload.data.arrival_order_items}}

                <!-- PO NUMBERS + BARCODE -->
                <mj-section border-left="1px solid #e0e0e0" border-right="1px solid #e0e0e0" border-bottom="1px solid #e0e0e0">

                <mj-column border-right="1px solid #e0e0e0" width="45%">
                    <mj-text font-size="12px" padding="12px">PO Number</mj-text>
                    <mj-text padding="12px" font-weight="600">{{payload.data.code}}</mj-text>
                    <mj-image src="cid:{{cid}}" />
                </mj-column>

                <mj-column width="10%">
                    <mj-text font-size="12px"></mj-text>
                </mj-column>

                <mj-column border-left="1px solid #e0e0e0" width="45%">
                    <mj-text font-size="12px" padding="12px">Supplier PO Number</mj-text>
                    <mj-text padding="12px" font-weight="600">
                    ${purchaseOrder.supplier_id.code}
                    </mj-text>
                    <mj-image src="data:image/svg+xml;utf8,${encodeURIComponent(supplierPoNumberBarcode)}" />
                </mj-column>

                </mj-section>

                <!-- BUTTON -->
                <mj-section padding="20px 0px 20px 0px">
                <mj-column>
                    <mj-button width="100%" background-color="#005EFF">
                    Submit Delivery Number Here
                    </mj-button>
                </mj-column>
                </mj-section>

            </mj-body>
        </mjml>

name: Set Payload + Attachment
func:
const base64Image = "";

msg.attachments = [
  {
    filename: "image1.png",
    content: base64Image.replace(/\n/g, ""),
    encoding: "base64",
    cid: "imageqr"
  }
];

msg.to = "ryan.novatama@gmail.com"; // ganti sesuai alamat tujuan
msg.payload = {
  subject: "Email with Inline Image (CID)",
  arrival_number: "KOKAK123",
  qr_code: base64Image.replace(/\n/g, ""),
  template: {
    name: "email-notification",
    data: {
      full_name_to: "Anang Kurendy",
      message: "Berikut adalah gambar yang disisipkan secara inline."
    }
  }
};

return msg;

name: Print Qr Code
template:
Delivery Confirmation & QR Code Printing /* Custom link style to match the blue in the image */ .link-text { color: #1a73e8; text-decoration: none; font-weight: normal; } .footer-link { color: #555555; text-decoration: underline; } Dear {{payload.data.supplier.name}}, Regarding the upcoming delivery for {{payload.data.di_number}}, we kindly ask for your support to complete the delivery confirmation and print the delivery QR Code, which will be used as the delivery identification. Please follow the steps below:
  1. Click the confirmation link:
    Delivery Confirmation & Qty Input Link
  2. Input the delivery quantity (QTY) based on the planned shipment.
  3. After submitting the QTY, the system will show a QR Code preview.
  4. Please print the QR Code and prepare it for the receiving process.
 If you encounter any issues while submitting the form or the QR Code preview does not appear, please reply to this email and we will assist you.
Thank you for your cooperation. Best regards, PT.SUMBER MAS AUTORINDO Jl. Science Timur 1 Blok A-5
Kawasan Industri Jababeka
Kec. Cikarang Timur Kab. Bekasi - Jawa Barat
Telp : +6221-29573969
https://www.sumbermas-autorindo.com

name: Cancellation
template:
Purchase Order Cancellation Notice .order-table { border-collapse: collapse; } /* ADDED: Applying width to the cells */ .label-cell { width: 50%; } .value-cell { width: 50%; } Dear {{payload.data.purchase_order.supplier.name}}, We would like to inform you that the following purchase order has been cancelled: Purchase Order Number: {{payload.data.purchase_order.po_number}} Arrival Order Number: {{payload.data.arrival.code}} DI Number: {{payload.data.purchase_order.di_number | default: 'TBA'}} Order Date: {{payload.data.purchase_order.order_date | default: '-'}} Estimated Delivery Date: {{payload.data.purchase_order.delivery_date | default: '-'}} Reason for Cancellation: The cancellation was made due to {{cancellation_reason | default: 'Reason not specified'}}. Please disregard the previously sent order and **do not proceed with shipment or invoicing** related to this order. Contact Information for Clarification: For any confirmation or clarification regarding this cancellation, please contact our procurement team at:
📞 **{{contact_person_name | default: 'TBA'}}** – {{contact_phone_number | default: 'TBA'}}
📧 **{{contact_email | default: 'TBA'}}** We apologize for any inconvenience this may cause and appreciate your understanding. Best regards,
**{{sender_name | default: 'Name - TBA'}}**
{{sender_company_name | default: 'Company Name - TBA'}}
{{sender_phone_number | default: 'Phone Number - TBA'}}
{{sender_email_website | default: 'Email/Company Website - TBA'}}
